````html
<div id="telegram-link-modal" class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden items-center justify-center bg-black/60 px-4 py-6 backdrop-blur-sm">
    <div class="w-full max-w-lg overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-aws-border bg-white shadow-2xl dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-[#1c2539]">
        <div class="flex items-start justify-between border-b border-aws-border px-6 py-4 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
            <div>
                <h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark">Link Telegram</h2>
                <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">
                    Send this command to the LogRider Telegram bot. The link token expires in 10 minutes.
                </p>
            </div>
            <button type="button" onclick="closeTelegramLinkModal()" class="rounded p-1 text-aws-textMuted transition-colors hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textMutedDark dark:hover:bg-white/10 dark:hover:text-white" aria-label="Close Telegram link dialog">
                <svg class="h-5 w-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="2">
                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"></path>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
        <div class="space-y-4 px-6 py-5">
            <div id="telegram-link-loading" class="hidden rounded border border-sky-200 bg-sky-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-sky-700 dark:border-sky-900/60 dark:bg-sky-500/10 dark:text-sky-300">
                Generating Telegram link command...
            </div>
            <div id="telegram-link-content" class="hidden space-y-3">
                <label for="telegram-link-command" class="block text-sm font-bold text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark">
                    Telegram command
                </label>
                <div class="flex gap-2">
                    <input id="telegram-link-command" readonly class="min-w-0 flex-1 rounded border border-gray-300 bg-gray-50 px-3 py-2 font-mono text-sm text-aws-text focus:outline-none dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f] dark:text-aws-textDark" value="">
                    <button id="telegram-copy-btn" type="button" onclick="copyTelegramLinkCommand()" class="rounded-full bg-aws-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-aws-primaryHover">
                        Copy
                    </button>
                </div>
                <p id="telegram-copy-status" class="min-h-[1.25rem] text-sm text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400"></p>
            </div>
            <div id="telegram-link-error" class="hidden rounded border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-700 dark:border-red-900/60 dark:bg-red-500/10 dark:text-red-300"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="flex justify-end gap-2 border-t border-aws-border px-6 py-4 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
            <button type="button" onclick="closeTelegramLinkModal()" class="rounded-full border border-gray-300 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-aws-text transition-colors hover:bg-gray-100 dark:border-gray-600 dark:text-aws-textDark dark:hover:bg-white/10">
                Close
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
    if (typeof openTelegramLinkModal === 'undefined') {
        window.openTelegramLinkModal = function() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('telegram-link-modal');
            if (!modal) return;
            modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            modal.classList.add('flex');
        };
    }
    if (typeof closeTelegramLinkModal === 'undefined') {
        window.closeTelegramLinkModal = function() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('telegram-link-modal');
            if (!modal) return;
            modal.classList.add('hidden');
            modal.classList.remove('flex');
        };
    }
    if (typeof setTelegramLinkModalState === 'undefined') {
        window.setTelegramLinkModalState = function({ loading = false, command = '', error = '' } = {}) {
            const loadingEl = document.getElementById('telegram-link-loading');
            const contentEl = document.getElementById('telegram-link-content');
            const commandEl = document.getElementById('telegram-link-command');
            const errorEl = document.getElementById('telegram-link-error');
            const statusEl = document.getElementById('telegram-copy-status');
            loadingEl?.classList.toggle('hidden', !loading);
            contentEl?.classList.toggle('hidden', !command);
            errorEl?.classList.toggle('hidden', !error);
            if (commandEl) commandEl.value = command;
            if (errorEl) errorEl.textContent = error;
            if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = '';
        };
    }
    if (typeof copyTelegramLinkCommand === 'undefined') {
        window.copyTelegramLinkCommand = async function() {
            const input = document.getElementById('telegram-link-command');
            const status = document.getElementById('telegram-copy-status');
            const value = input?.value || '';
            if (!value) return;
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard?.writeText) {
                    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(value);
                } else {
                    input.select();
                    document.execCommand('copy');
                    input.blur();
                }
                if (status) status.textContent = 'Copied to clipboard.';
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(error);
                if (status) status.textContent = 'Could not copy. Select the command manually.';
            }
        };
    }
    if (typeof generateTelegramLink === 'undefined') {
        window.generateTelegramLink = async function() {
            openTelegramLinkModal();
            setTelegramLinkModalState({ loading: true });
            const token = localStorage.getItem('logrider_token');
            const headers = token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {};
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/telegram/generate-link-token', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers,
                    credentials: 'same-origin',
                });
                const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
                if (!res.ok) {
                    throw new Error(data.error || `Telegram link request failed with HTTP ${res.status}`);
                }
                const command = data.command || (data.token ? `/link ${data.token}` : '');
                if (!command) {
                    throw new Error('Server did not return a Telegram link command.');
                }
                setTelegramLinkModalState({ command });
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(error);
                setTelegramLinkModalState({
                    error: error.message || 'Could not generate Telegram link command.',
                });
            }
        };
    }
    if (typeof toggleAlerts === 'undefined') {
        window.toggleAlerts = function() {
            const enabled = localStorage.getItem('alerts_enabled') !== 'false';
            localStorage.setItem('alerts_enabled', String(!enabled));
            if (typeof updateAlertsIcon === 'function') updateAlertsIcon();
        };
    }
    if (typeof updateAlertsIcon === 'undefined') {
        window.updateAlertsIcon = function() {
            const enabled = localStorage.getItem('alerts_enabled') !== 'false';
            const icon = document.getElementById('bell-icon');
            const offIcon = document.getElementById('bell-off-icon');
            const btn = document.getElementById('bell-btn');
            if (icon) icon.classList.toggle('hidden', !enabled);
            if (offIcon) offIcon.classList.toggle('hidden', enabled);
            if (btn) {
                btn.classList.toggle('text-slate-500', !enabled);
                btn.classList.toggle('text-slate-300', enabled);
            }
        };
    }
    if (typeof logout === 'undefined') {
        window.logout = function() {
            localStorage.removeItem('logrider_token');
            localStorage.removeItem('logrider_role');
            localStorage.removeItem('logrider_username');
            window.location.reload();
        };
    }
    if (typeof syncTopbarUser === 'undefined') {
        window.syncTopbarUser = function() {
            const token = localStorage.getItem('logrider_token');
            const role = localStorage.getItem('logrider_role');
            const username = localStorage.getItem('logrider_username');
            const controls = document.getElementById('user-controls');
            const badge = document.getElementById('role-badge-text');
            const nav = document.getElementById('top-nav');
            const configNav = document.getElementById('nav-config');
            if (nav) nav.classList.remove('hidden');
            if (token && controls) {
                controls.classList.remove('hidden');
                controls.classList.add('flex');
            }
            if (badge) {
                badge.textContent = username || role || '';
            }
            if (configNav) {
                if (role === 'admin') configNav.classList.remove('hidden');
                else configNav.classList.add('hidden');
            }
            const path = window.location.pathname;
            document.querySelectorAll('[data-nav-path]').forEach((link) => {
                const active = link.getAttribute('data-nav-path') === path;
                link.classList.toggle('text-white', active);
                link.classList.toggle('bg-white/10', active);
                link.classList.toggle('text-slate-300', !active);
            });
            if (typeof updateAlertsIcon === 'function') updateAlertsIcon();
        };
    }
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        if (typeof syncTopbarUser === 'function') syncTopbarUser();
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
            if (event.key === 'Escape') closeTelegramLinkModal();
        });
        document.getElementById('telegram-link-modal')?.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            if (event.target?.id === 'telegram-link-modal') closeTelegramLinkModal();
        });
    });
</script>
<script src="/public/js/custom-controls.js"></script>
````

## File: logrider/server/public/css/cloudscape-logrider.css
````css
:root {
  --lr-theme-transition-duration: 300ms;
  --lr-theme-transition-easing: ease;
  --cs-color-background-layout-main: #f2f3f3;
  --cs-color-background-container-content: #ffffff;
  --cs-color-background-container-header: #fafafa;
  --cs-color-background-top-navigation: #ffffff;
  --cs-color-background-top-navigation-hover: rgba(9, 114, 211, 0.08);
  --cs-color-background-top-navigation-active: rgba(9, 114, 211, 0.12);
  --cs-color-border-divider-default: #d5dbdb;
  --cs-color-border-top-navigation: #d5dbdb;
  --cs-color-border-input-default: #879596;
  --cs-color-text-body-default: #16191f;
  --cs-color-text-body-secondary: #5f6b7a;
  --cs-color-text-heading-default: #16191f;
  --cs-color-text-accent: #0972d3;
  --cs-color-text-top-navigation: #16191f;
  --cs-color-text-top-navigation-secondary: #5f6b7a;
  --cs-color-text-top-navigation-hover: #0972d3;
  --cs-color-background-button-primary-default: #0972d3;
  --cs-color-background-button-primary-hover: #033160;
  --cs-color-focus-ring: #0972d3;
  --cs-shadow-container: 0 1px 1px rgba(0, 28, 36, 0.12);
  --cs-shadow-top-navigation: 0 1px 1px rgba(0, 28, 36, 0.12);
  --cs-radius-control: 2px;
  --cs-radius-container: 8px;
}
.dark {
  --cs-color-background-layout-main: #0f141a;
  --cs-color-background-container-content: #151d26;
  --cs-color-background-container-header: #111923;
  --cs-color-background-top-navigation: #0f1b2a;
  --cs-color-background-top-navigation-hover: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  --cs-color-background-top-navigation-active: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
  --cs-color-border-divider-default: #414d5c;
  --cs-color-border-top-navigation: #2a3545;
  --cs-color-border-input-default: #5f6b7a;
  --cs-color-text-body-default: #eaeded;
  --cs-color-text-body-secondary: #aab7b8;
  --cs-color-text-heading-default: #ffffff;
  --cs-color-text-accent: #44b9ff;
  --cs-color-text-top-navigation: #ffffff;
  --cs-color-text-top-navigation-secondary: #aab7b8;
  --cs-color-text-top-navigation-hover: #ffffff;
  --cs-color-background-button-primary-default: #0972d3;
  --cs-color-background-button-primary-hover: #44b9ff;
  --cs-color-focus-ring: #44b9ff;
  --cs-shadow-top-navigation: 0 1px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
}
html,
body {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-body-default);
  background: var(--cs-color-background-layout-main);
}
body {
  font-size: 14px;
}
html,
body,
main,
header,
section,
aside,
div,
table,
thead,
tbody,
tr,
td,
th,
button,
a,
input,
select,
textarea,
svg,
path,
.lr-select,
.lr-select-trigger,
.lr-select-menu,
.cscape-top-navigation,
.cscape-nav-link,
.cscape-icon-button,
.cscape-user-badge,
.cscape-service-title,
.cscape-service-subtitle {
  transition-property: background-color, border-color, color, fill, stroke, box-shadow, opacity;
  transition-duration: var(--lr-theme-transition-duration) !important;
  transition-timing-function: var(--lr-theme-transition-easing) !important;
}
main {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-layout-main);
}
.cscape-top-navigation {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-top-navigation);
  color: var(--cs-color-text-top-navigation);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--cs-color-border-top-navigation);
  box-shadow: var(--cs-shadow-top-navigation);
}
.cscape-service-logo {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  object-fit: contain;
  mix-blend-mode: normal;
}
.cscape-logo-shell {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-top-navigation-active);
  border-color: var(--cs-color-border-top-navigation);
}
.cscape-service-title {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-top-navigation);
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 20px;
}
.cscape-service-subtitle {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-top-navigation-secondary);
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 16px;
}
.cscape-nav-link {
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--cs-color-text-top-navigation-secondary) !important;
  padding: 7px 10px;
  line-height: 18px;
}
.cscape-nav-link:hover {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-top-navigation-hover) !important;
  background: var(--cs-color-background-top-navigation-hover);
}
.cscape-nav-link.bg-white\/10,
.cscape-nav-link.text-white {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-top-navigation) !important;
  background: var(--cs-color-background-top-navigation-active) !important;
}
.cscape-icon-button {
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--cs-color-text-top-navigation-secondary);
}
.cscape-icon-button:hover {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-top-navigation-hover);
  background: var(--cs-color-background-top-navigation-hover);
}
.cscape-user-badge {
  border-radius: var(--cs-radius-control);
  border: 1px solid var(--cs-color-border-top-navigation);
  background: var(--cs-color-background-top-navigation-active);
  color: var(--cs-color-text-top-navigation);
}
h1 {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-heading-default);
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  line-height: 36px;
}
h2 {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-heading-default);
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  line-height: 24px;
}
input,
select,
textarea {
  border-radius: var(--cs-radius-control) !important;
}
button,
a[role="button"] {
  border-radius: 999px !important;
}
button {
  min-height: 32px;
}
button:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.72;
}
button.bg-aws-primary,
button[class*="bg-aws-primary"] {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-button-primary-default) !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--cs-color-background-button-primary-default);
  box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
}
button.bg-aws-primary:hover,
button[class*="bg-aws-primary"]:hover {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-button-primary-hover) !important;
  border-color: var(--cs-color-background-button-primary-hover);
}
input,
select,
textarea {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-container-content) !important;
  border-color: var(--cs-color-border-input-default) !important;
  color: var(--cs-color-text-body-default) !important;
  min-height: 32px;
}
input[type="checkbox"] {
  appearance: none;
  align-items: center;
  background: transparent !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--cs-color-border-input-default);
  color: var(--cs-color-background-button-primary-default);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-grid;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  height: 18px;
  margin: 0;
  min-height: 18px;
  place-content: center;
  width: 18px;
}
input[type="checkbox"]::before {
  border-bottom: 2px solid currentColor;
  border-right: 2px solid currentColor;
  content: "";
  height: 10px;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: rotate(45deg) scale(0.7);
  transition: opacity 0.12s ease, transform 0.12s ease;
  width: 5px;
}
input[type="checkbox"]:checked {
  background: transparent !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--cs-color-background-button-primary-default);
}
input[type="checkbox"]:checked::before {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: rotate(45deg) scale(1);
}
select.lr-native-select {
  height: 1px !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  min-height: 1px !important;
  opacity: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
  position: absolute !important;
  width: 1px !important;
}
.lr-select {
  display: inline-block;
  min-width: 120px;
  position: relative;
  align-self: center;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.lr-select.lr-select-full {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
}
.lr-select-trigger {
  align-items: center;
  background: var(--cs-color-background-container-content);
  border: 1px solid var(--cs-color-border-input-default);
  border-radius: var(--cs-radius-control) !important;
  color: var(--cs-color-text-body-default);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  font-size: 14px;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  line-height: 20px;
  min-height: 34px;
  min-width: 100%;
  padding: 6px 10px 6px 12px;
  text-align: left;
  width: 100%;
}
.lr-select-trigger:hover {
  border-color: var(--cs-color-focus-ring);
}
.lr-select-trigger:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid var(--cs-color-focus-ring) !important;
  outline-offset: 2px;
}
.lr-select-label {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.lr-select-icon {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-body-secondary);
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  height: 14px;
  transition: transform 0.16s ease;
  width: 14px;
}
.lr-select-icon .filled {
  fill: currentColor;
}
.lr-select.open .lr-select-icon {
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}
.lr-select-menu {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-container-content);
  border: 1px solid var(--cs-color-border-divider-default);
  border-radius: var(--cs-radius-container);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0, 28, 36, 0.18);
  left: 0;
  margin-top: 4px;
  max-height: 0;
  min-width: 100%;
  opacity: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  pointer-events: none;
  position: absolute;
  top: 100%;
  transform: translateY(-6px);
  transform-origin: top;
  transition: max-height 0.18s ease, opacity 0.18s ease, transform 0.18s ease;
  z-index: 120;
}
.lr-select.open .lr-select-menu {
  animation: lrDropdownSlideDown 0.18s ease-out;
  max-height: 280px;
  opacity: 1;
  overflow-y: auto;
  pointer-events: auto;
  transform: translateY(0);
}
.lr-select.closing .lr-select-menu {
  animation: lrDropdownSlideUp 0.14s ease-in;
}
.lr-select-option {
  background: transparent;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  color: var(--cs-color-text-body-default);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: block;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 20px;
  min-height: 0;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  text-align: left;
  width: 100%;
}
.lr-select-option:hover,
.lr-select-option.active {
  background: rgba(9, 114, 211, 0.10);
}
.lr-select-option:disabled {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-body-secondary);
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
@keyframes lrDropdownSlideDown {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-6px); max-height: 0; }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); max-height: 280px; }
}
@keyframes lrDropdownSlideUp {
  from { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); max-height: 280px; }
  to { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-6px); max-height: 0; }
}
.lr-sticky-page-header {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-layout-main);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--cs-color-border-divider-default);
  margin-left: -1rem;
  margin-right: -1rem;
  padding: 1rem;
  position: sticky;
  top: 53px;
  z-index: 80;
}
@media (min-width: 640px) {
  .lr-sticky-page-header {
    margin-left: -1.5rem;
    margin-right: -1.5rem;
    padding-left: 1.5rem;
    padding-right: 1.5rem;
  }
}
@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  .lr-sticky-page-header {
    margin-left: -2rem;
    margin-right: -2rem;
    padding-left: 2rem;
    padding-right: 2rem;
  }
}
.lr-screen-dim {
  background: rgba(15, 20, 26, 0.46);
  backdrop-filter: blur(1px);
  inset: 0;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  position: fixed;
  transition: opacity 0.16s ease;
  z-index: 70;
}
.lr-screen-dim.active {
  opacity: 1;
  pointer-events: auto;
}
.lr-save-visual {
  align-items: center;
  display: inline-flex;
  height: 28px;
  justify-content: center;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  transition: opacity 0.12s ease, transform 0.12s ease;
  width: 28px;
}
.lr-save-visual.active {
  opacity: 1;
}
.lr-save-spinner,
.lr-save-tick {
  display: none;
}
.lr-save-visual.spinning .lr-save-spinner {
  animation: lrCounterClockwiseSpin 1s linear infinite;
  border: 3px solid rgba(9, 114, 211, 0.18);
  border-right-color: var(--cs-color-background-button-primary-default);
  border-radius: 999px;
  display: block;
  height: 24px;
  width: 24px;
}
.lr-save-visual.done .lr-save-tick {
  align-items: center;
  background: #16a34a;
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: #ffffff;
  display: inline-flex;
  height: 24px;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 24px;
}
@keyframes lrCounterClockwiseSpin {
  to { transform: rotate(-360deg); }
}
input:focus,
select:focus,
textarea:focus,
button:focus-visible,
a:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid var(--cs-color-focus-ring) !important;
  outline-offset: 2px;
}
.rounded-lg,
.rounded-xl {
  border-radius: var(--cs-radius-container) !important;
}
section.rounded-lg,
div.rounded-lg.border,
aside.rounded-lg {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-container-content) !important;
  border-color: var(--cs-color-border-divider-default) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--cs-shadow-container);
}
section.rounded-lg > .border-b,
div.rounded-lg.border > .border-b {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-container-header);
  border-color: var(--cs-color-border-divider-default) !important;
}
thead {
  background: var(--cs-color-background-container-header) !important;
  color: var(--cs-color-text-body-secondary) !important;
  border-color: var(--cs-color-border-divider-default) !important;
}
tbody tr {
  border-color: var(--cs-color-border-divider-default) !important;
}
tbody tr:hover {
  background: rgba(9, 114, 211, 0.08) !important;
}
th {
  color: var(--cs-color-text-body-secondary);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  text-transform: none;
}
td,
th {
  vertical-align: top;
}
.logs-scroll {
  scrollbar-color: #879596 transparent;
  scrollbar-width: thin;
}
.logs-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: #879596 !important;
  border-radius: 4px !important;
}
[id^="summary-"],
[id^="kpi-"] {
  letter-spacing: 0;
}
.cloudscape-flash {
  border-radius: var(--cs-radius-container);
  border: 1px solid #d13212;
  background: #fff7f7;
  color: #16191f;
  box-shadow: var(--cs-shadow-container);
}
.dark .cloudscape-flash {
  background: #2a1414;
  color: #ffffff;
}
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .cscape-top-navigation nav {
    display: none;
  }
  main {
    padding-left: 16px !important;
    padding-right: 16px !important;
  }
}
````

## File: logrider/server/public/js/custom-controls.js
````javascript
(function () {
  const selectMap = new WeakMap();
  const glyph = '<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m8 11 4-6H4l4 6Z" class="filled stroke-linejoin-round"></path></svg>';
  function closeSelect(wrapper) {
    if (!wrapper?.classList.contains('open')) return;
    wrapper.classList.remove('open');
    wrapper.classList.add('closing');
    wrapper.querySelector('.lr-select-trigger')?.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    window.setTimeout(() => wrapper.classList.remove('closing'), 160);
  }
  function closeAll(except) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.lr-select.open').forEach((wrapper) => {
      if (wrapper !== except) closeSelect(wrapper);
    });
  }
  function optionLabel(option) {
    return option?.textContent?.trim() || option?.value || '';
  }
  function syncSelect(select) {
    const state = selectMap.get(select);
    if (!state) return;
    const selected = select.selectedOptions?.[0] || select.options[select.selectedIndex] || select.options[0];
    state.label.textContent = optionLabel(selected);
    state.trigger.disabled = select.disabled;
    state.wrapper.classList.toggle('disabled', select.disabled);
    state.menu.querySelectorAll('.lr-select-option').forEach((button) => {
      button.classList.toggle('active', button.dataset.value === select.value);
      button.setAttribute('aria-selected', button.dataset.value === select.value ? 'true' : 'false');
    });
  }
  function renderOptions(select) {
    const state = selectMap.get(select);
    if (!state) return;
    state.menu.innerHTML = '';
    Array.from(select.options).forEach((option) => {
      const button = document.createElement('button');
      button.type = 'button';
      button.className = 'lr-select-option';
      button.dataset.value = option.value;
      button.disabled = option.disabled;
      button.setAttribute('role', 'option');
      button.textContent = optionLabel(option);
      button.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (option.disabled) return;
        select.value = option.value;
        select.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
        select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
        syncSelect(select);
        closeSelect(state.wrapper);
      });
      state.menu.appendChild(button);
    });
    syncSelect(select);
  }
  function shouldBeFullWidth(select) {
    const classes = select.className || '';
    return classes.includes('w-full') || classes.includes('flex-grow') || select.parentElement?.className?.includes('grid');
  }
  function enhanceSelect(select) {
    if (!(select instanceof HTMLSelectElement) || select.multiple || select.dataset.customControl === 'false') return;
    if (selectMap.has(select)) {
      syncSelect(select);
      return;
    }
    const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
    wrapper.className = `lr-select${shouldBeFullWidth(select) ? ' lr-select-full' : ''}`;
    const trigger = document.createElement('button');
    trigger.type = 'button';
    trigger.className = 'lr-select-trigger';
    trigger.setAttribute('aria-haspopup', 'listbox');
    trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    const label = document.createElement('span');
    label.className = 'lr-select-label';
    const icon = document.createElement('span');
    icon.className = 'lr-select-icon';
    icon.innerHTML = glyph;
    const menu = document.createElement('div');
    menu.className = 'lr-select-menu';
    menu.setAttribute('role', 'listbox');
    trigger.append(label, icon);
    wrapper.append(trigger, menu);
    select.classList.add('lr-native-select');
    select.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', wrapper);
    selectMap.set(select, { wrapper, trigger, label, menu });
    renderOptions(select);
    trigger.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (select.disabled) return;
      const willOpen = !wrapper.classList.contains('open');
      closeAll(wrapper);
      wrapper.classList.toggle('open', willOpen);
      trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', willOpen ? 'true' : 'false');
    });
    select.addEventListener('change', () => syncSelect(select));
    const observer = new MutationObserver(() => renderOptions(select));
    observer.observe(select, {
      attributes: true,
      attributeFilter: ['disabled'],
      childList: true,
      subtree: true,
    });
  }
  function enhanceControls(root = document) {
    root.querySelectorAll?.('select').forEach(enhanceSelect);
  }
  document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
    if (!event.target.closest?.('.lr-select')) closeAll();
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
    if (event.key === 'Escape') closeAll();
  });
  const valueDescriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLSelectElement.prototype, 'value');
  if (valueDescriptor?.set && !HTMLSelectElement.prototype.__logriderValuePatched) {
    Object.defineProperty(HTMLSelectElement.prototype, 'value', {
      get: valueDescriptor.get,
      set(value) {
        valueDescriptor.set.call(this, value);
        queueMicrotask(() => syncSelect(this));
      },
    });
    Object.defineProperty(HTMLSelectElement.prototype, '__logriderValuePatched', { value: true });
  }
  window.refreshCustomControls = function () {
    enhanceControls(document);
    document.querySelectorAll('select').forEach(syncSelect);
  };
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    enhanceControls(document);
    const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
      mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
        mutation.addedNodes.forEach((node) => {
          if (node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) enhanceControls(node);
        });
      });
    });
    observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  });
})();
````

## File: logrider/server/alerts.html

````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="light">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>LogRider Alerts</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.cdnfonts.com/css/amazon-ember" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <link href="/public/css/cloudscape-logrider.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: 'class',
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        aws: {
                            nav: '#0f1b2d',
                            bg: '#f2f3f3',
                            bgDark: '#0f1b2d',
                            panel: '#ffffff',
                            panelDark: '#1c2539',
                            border: '#eaeded',
                            borderDark: '#414d5c',
                            text: '#16191f',
                            textDark: '#ffffff',
                            textMuted: '#545b64',
                            textMutedDark: '#9ba7b6',
                            primary: '#0972d3',
                            primaryHover: '#035b96'
                        }
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['"Amazon Ember"', 'sans-serif'],
                        mono: ['Menlo', 'Monaco', 'Consolas', '"Courier New"', 'monospace']
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    <style>
        .logs-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; height: 8px; }
        .logs-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
        .logs-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #aab7b8; border-radius: 999px; }
        .dark .logs-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #545b64; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-aws-bg font-sans text-aws-text antialiased transition-colors duration-200 dark:bg-aws-bgDark dark:text-aws-textDark h-screen flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
    <main class="mx-auto max-w-[1400px] w-full px-4 py-8 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0 overflow-hidden">
        <div id="login-screen" class="mx-auto mt-12 max-w-md">
            <div class="overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark">
                <div class="border-b border-aws-border px-6 py-5 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
                    <h2 class="text-xl font-bold">Sign in</h2>
                    <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Enter your credentials to access alerts.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="px-6 py-6">
                    <form id="login-form" class="space-y-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Username</label>
                            <input id="username" type="text" required class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-aws-primary focus:outline-none dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Password</label>
                            <input id="password" type="password" required class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-aws-primary focus:outline-none dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        </div>
                        <button type="submit" class="w-full rounded-full bg-aws-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-aws-primaryHover">Sign in</button>
                        <p id="login-error" class="hidden text-sm font-medium text-red-500"></p>
                    </form>
                </div>
                <div class="border-t border-aws-border bg-gray-50 px-6 py-4 text-xs text-aws-textMuted dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-black/20 dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">
                    <span class="font-semibold">Demo accounts:</span> Ayin/admin123 or Benjamin/eng123
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div id="alerts-screen" class="hidden flex-col space-y-6 flex-1 overflow-hidden">
            <section class="flex flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">Alert Stream</h1>
                    <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Recent and live ERROR / CRITICAL alerts grouped by application and message.</p>
                </div>
                <button onclick="handleRefresh()" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-aws-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-aws-primaryHover">
                    <svg id="refresh-icon" class="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="2">
                        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4 4v5h.582m15.356 2A8.001 8.001 0 0 0 4.582 9m0 0H9m11 11v-5h-.581m0 0a8.003 8.003 0 0 1-15.357-2m15.357 2H15"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span>Refresh</span>
                </button>
            </section>
            <section class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-3">
                <div class="rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel p-4 shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark">
                    <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Total Alerts</p>
                    <p id="summary-total" class="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold">0</p>
                </div>
                <div class="rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel p-4 shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark">
                    <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Critical</p>
                    <p id="summary-critical" class="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold text-red-500">0</p>
                </div>
                <div class="rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel p-4 shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark">
                    <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Unique Signatures</p>
                    <p id="summary-unique" class="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold text-aws-primary">0</p>
                </div>
            </section>
            <section class="rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
                <div class="border-b border-aws-border px-5 py-4 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
                    <div class="flex flex-col gap-3 xl:flex-row xl:items-center">
                        <div class="grid flex-1 grid-cols-1 gap-3 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(300px,1fr)_180px_180px]">
                            <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 bg-white dark:bg-[#16191f] border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 p-1.5 rounded shadow-sm w-full">
                                <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 ml-2 shrink-0" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"></path></svg>
                                <select id="search-col" onchange="renderAlerts()" class="bg-transparent text-sm font-bold text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark focus:outline-none cursor-pointer">
                                    <option value="application">Application</option>
                                    <option value="message">Message</option>
                                </select>
                                <div class="w-px h-5 bg-gray-300 dark:bg-gray-600 shrink-0"></div>
                                <input id="search-query" type="text" oninput="renderAlerts()" placeholder="Search alerts..." class="flex-grow px-2 text-sm bg-transparent border-none focus:outline-none text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark w-full">
                            </div>
                            <select id="application-filter" onchange="renderAlerts()" class="rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-aws-primary focus:outline-none dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f] text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark cursor-pointer">
                                <option value="">All Applications</option>
                            </select>
                            <select id="level-filter" onchange="renderAlerts()" class="rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-aws-primary focus:outline-none dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f] text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark cursor-pointer">
                                <option value="">All Levels</option>
                                <option value="ERROR">ERROR</option>
                                <option value="CRITICAL">CRITICAL</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-end">
                            <span class="relative flex h-3 w-3">
                                <span id="ws-ping" class="absolute inline-flex h-full w-full animate-ping rounded-full bg-green-400 opacity-75"></span>
                                <span id="ws-dot" class="relative inline-flex h-3 w-3 rounded-full bg-green-500"></span>
                            </span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="flex-1 overflow-auto logs-scroll">
                    <table class="min-w-full table-fixed text-left text-sm">
                        <thead class="sticky top-0 z-10 border-b border-aws-border bg-gray-50 text-xs font-bold uppercase text-aws-textMuted shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-black/20 dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">
                            <tr>
                                <th class="w-[110px] px-5 py-3">Count</th>
                                <th class="w-[120px] px-5 py-3">Level</th>
                                <th class="w-[220px] px-5 py-3">Application</th>
                                <th class="px-5 py-3">Message</th>
                                <th class="w-[220px] px-5 py-3">Last Seen</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody id="alerts-body" class="divide-y divide-aws-border dark:divide-aws-borderDark"></tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </section>
        </div>
    </main>
    <script>
        const alertsBySignature = new Map();
        let ws;
        const loginScreen = document.getElementById('login-screen');
        const alertsScreen = document.getElementById('alerts-screen');
        const alertsBody = document.getElementById('alerts-body');
        const applicationFilter = document.getElementById('application-filter');
        function initTheme() {
            const darkIcon = document.getElementById('theme-toggle-dark-icon');
            const lightIcon = document.getElementById('theme-toggle-light-icon');
            const prefersDark = localStorage.getItem('color-theme') === 'dark'
                || (!('color-theme' in localStorage) && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches);
            document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', prefersDark);
            darkIcon?.classList.toggle('hidden', !document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark'));
            lightIcon?.classList.toggle('hidden', document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark'));
            document.getElementById('theme-toggle')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const nextDark = !document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark');
                document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', nextDark);
                localStorage.setItem('color-theme', nextDark ? 'dark' : 'light');
                darkIcon?.classList.toggle('hidden', !nextDark);
                lightIcon?.classList.toggle('hidden', nextDark);
            });
        }
        function setWsIndicator(isConnected) {
            document.getElementById('ws-dot').className = `relative inline-flex h-3 w-3 rounded-full ${isConnected ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-red-500'}`;
            document.getElementById('ws-ping').className = isConnected
                ? 'absolute inline-flex h-full w-full animate-ping rounded-full bg-green-400 opacity-75'
                : 'hidden';
        }
        function escapeHtml(value) {
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.textContent = value ?? '';
            return div.innerHTML;
        }
        function formatTimestamp(value) {
            let str = String(value);
            if (!str.endsWith('Z') && str.length > 10) {
                str = str.replace(' ', 'T');
                if (!str.endsWith('Z')) str += 'Z';
            }
            const date = new Date(str);
            if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return escapeHtml(String(value || '-'));
            return escapeHtml(date.toLocaleString('en-CA', {
                hour12: false,
                year: 'numeric',
                month: '2-digit',
                day: '2-digit',
                hour: '2-digit',
                minute: '2-digit',
                second: '2-digit'
            }).replace(',', ''));
        }
        function alertSignature(log) {
            return `${log.Application_Name || 'unknown'}|${log.Message || ''}`;
        }
        function ensureApplicationOption(appName) {
            if (!appName || [...applicationFilter.options].some((option) => option.value === appName)) return;
            const option = document.createElement('option');
            option.value = appName;
            option.textContent = appName;
            applicationFilter.appendChild(option);
        }
        function upsertAlert(log) {
            const signature = alertSignature(log);
            const existing = alertsBySignature.get(signature);
            let ts = log.Timestamp;
            if (ts && typeof ts === 'string' && ts.includes(' ') && !ts.includes('T')) {
                ts = ts.replace(' ', 'T');
                if (!ts.endsWith('Z')) ts += 'Z';
            }
            const next = {
                Application_Name: log.Application_Name || 'unknown',
                Log_Level: (log.Log_Level || 'ERROR').toUpperCase(),
                Message: log.Message || '',
                Timestamp: ts,
                alert_count: Number(log.alert_count || log.count || 1),
            };
            if (existing) {
                existing.alert_count = Math.max(existing.alert_count, next.alert_count);
                existing.Timestamp = next.Timestamp;
                existing.Log_Level = next.Log_Level;
            } else {
                alertsBySignature.set(signature, next);
            }
            ensureApplicationOption(next.Application_Name);
        }
        function getVisibleAlerts() {
            const query = document.getElementById('search-query').value.trim().toLowerCase();
            const searchCol = document.getElementById('search-col').value;
            const app = applicationFilter.value;
            const level = document.getElementById('level-filter').value;
            return [...alertsBySignature.values()]
                .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.Timestamp) - new Date(a.Timestamp))
                .filter((alert) => {
                    if (app && alert.Application_Name !== app) return false;
                    if (level && alert.Log_Level !== level) return false;
                    if (!query) return true;
                    if (searchCol === 'message') return alert.Message.toLowerCase().includes(query);
                    return alert.Application_Name.toLowerCase().includes(query);
                });
        }
        function updateSummary() {
            const alerts = [...alertsBySignature.values()];
            document.getElementById('summary-total').textContent = alerts.reduce((sum, alert) => sum + alert.alert_count, 0);
            document.getElementById('summary-critical').textContent = alerts
                .filter((alert) => alert.Log_Level === 'CRITICAL')
                .reduce((sum, alert) => sum + alert.alert_count, 0);
            document.getElementById('summary-unique').textContent = alerts.length;
        }
        function renderAlerts() {
            const alerts = getVisibleAlerts();
            updateSummary();
            if (alerts.length === 0) {
                alertsBody.innerHTML = `
                    <tr>
                        <td colspan="5" class="px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">
                            No alerts found.
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                `;
                return;
            }
            alertsBody.innerHTML = alerts.map((alert) => `
                <tr class="transition-colors hover:bg-blue-50/60 dark:hover:bg-white/5">
                    <td class="px-5 py-3">
                        <span class="inline-flex min-w-[54px] justify-center rounded-full bg-aws-primary/10 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold text-aws-primary dark:text-sky-300">x${alert.alert_count}</span>
                    </td>
                    <td class="px-5 py-3">
                        <span class="inline-flex rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold ${alert.Log_Level === 'CRITICAL' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-500/15 dark:text-red-300' : 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-500/15 dark:text-amber-300'}">${escapeHtml(alert.Log_Level)}</span>
                    </td>
                    <td class="px-5 py-3">${escapeHtml(alert.Application_Name)}</td>
                    <td class="px-5 py-3 whitespace-normal break-words">${escapeHtml(alert.Message)}</td>
                    <td class="px-5 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">${formatTimestamp(alert.Timestamp)}</td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }
        async function fetchHistoricalAlerts() {
            const res = await fetch('/api/alerts/recent', {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('logrider_token')}` }
            });
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch alerts');
            const { alerts } = await res.json();
            alertsBySignature.clear();
            applicationFilter.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Applications</option>';
            (alerts || []).forEach((alert) => upsertAlert(alert));
            renderAlerts();
        }
        function connectWs() {
            if (ws) ws.close();
            const protocol = window.location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:';
            ws = new WebSocket(`${protocol}//${window.location.host}/api/ws`);
            ws.onopen = () => {
                setWsIndicator(true);
                fetchHistoricalAlerts().catch((error) => {
                    console.error('Failed to backfill alerts after WebSocket open:', error);
                });
            };
            ws.onclose = () => {
                setWsIndicator(false);
                setTimeout(connectWs, 3000);
            };
            ws.onerror = () => setWsIndicator(false);
            ws.onmessage = (event) => {
                let data;
                try {
                    data = JSON.parse(event.data);
                } catch {
                    return;
                }
                const log = data.type === 'ALERT' ? { ...data.log, alert_count: data.count || 1 } : data;
                if (!log?.Log_Level || (log.Log_Level !== 'ERROR' && log.Log_Level !== 'CRITICAL')) return;
                upsertAlert(log);
                renderAlerts();
            };
        }
        async function handleRefresh() {
            const icon = document.getElementById('refresh-icon');
            const tableContainer = document.getElementById('alerts-body');
            if (icon) {
                icon.style.animation = 'spin 1s linear infinite';
            }
            if (tableContainer) {
                tableContainer.classList.add('opacity-50', 'pointer-events-none', 'transition-opacity', 'duration-300');
            }
            try {
                const startTime = Date.now();
                await fetchHistoricalAlerts();
                const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                if (elapsed < 1000) {
                    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000 - elapsed));
                }
            } finally {
                if (icon) icon.style.animation = '';
                if (tableContainer) tableContainer.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'pointer-events-none');
            }
        }
        async function showAlerts() {
            loginScreen.classList.add('hidden');
            alertsScreen.classList.remove('hidden');
            alertsScreen.classList.add('flex');
            if (typeof syncTopbarUser === 'function') syncTopbarUser();
            connectWs();
            try {
                await fetchHistoricalAlerts();
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Failed to fetch historical alerts:', error);
            }
        }
        document.getElementById('login-form').addEventListener('submit', async (event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            const username = document.getElementById('username').value;
            const password = document.getElementById('password').value;
            const errorEl = document.getElementById('login-error');
            errorEl.classList.add('hidden');
            const res = await fetch('/login', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ username, password })
            });
            const data = await res.json();
            if (!res.ok) {
                errorEl.textContent = data.error || 'Login failed';
                errorEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                return;
            }
            localStorage.setItem('logrider_token', data.token);
            localStorage.setItem('logrider_role', data.role);
            localStorage.setItem('logrider_username', username);
            await showAlerts();
        });
        window.logout = function() {
            localStorage.removeItem('logrider_token');
            localStorage.removeItem('logrider_role');
            localStorage.removeItem('logrider_username');
            if (ws) ws.close();
            window.location.reload();
        };
        initTheme();
        if (localStorage.getItem('logrider_token')) {
            showAlerts().catch(console.error);
        } else {
            setWsIndicator(false);
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: logrider/server/config.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="light">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>LogRider Configs</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.cdnfonts.com/css/amazon-ember" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <link href="/public/css/cloudscape-logrider.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: 'class',
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        aws: {
                            nav: '#0f1b2d', navDark: '#0b1426', bg: '#f2f3f3', bgDark: '#0f1b2d', panel: '#ffffff', panelDark: '#1c2539',
                            border: '#eaeded', borderDark: '#414d5c', text: '#16191f', textDark: '#ffffff',
                            textMuted: '#545b64', textMutedDark: '#9ba7b6', primary: '#0972d3', primaryHover: '#035b96',
                            link: '#0073bb', linkDark: '#44b9ff'
                        }
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['"Amazon Ember"', 'sans-serif'],
                        mono: ['Menlo', 'Monaco', 'Consolas', '"Courier New"', 'monospace']
                    },
                    animation: {
                        'fade-in': 'fadeIn 0.3s ease-in-out',
                        'slide-in': 'slideIn 0.2s ease-out',
                        'zoom-in': 'zoomIn 0.2s ease-out',
                        'zoom-out': 'zoomOut 0.2s ease-in forwards',
                        'shrink-fade': 'shrinkFade 0.3s ease-out forwards',
                        'flash': 'flash 0.5s ease-out'
                    },
                    keyframes: {
                        fadeIn: {
                            '0%': { opacity: '0' },
                            '100%': { opacity: '1' },
                        },
                        slideIn: {
                            '0%': { transform: 'translateX(-10px)', opacity: '0' },
                            '100%': { transform: 'translateX(0)', opacity: '1' },
                        },
                        zoomIn: {
                            '0%': { transform: 'scale(0.8)', opacity: '0' },
                            '100%': { transform: 'scale(1)', opacity: '1' },
                        },
                        zoomOut: {
                            '0%': { transform: 'scale(1)', opacity: '1' },
                            '100%': { transform: 'scale(0)', opacity: '0' },
                        },
                        shrinkFade: {
                            '0%': { transform: 'scale(1)', opacity: '1', height: 'auto' },
                            '100%': { transform: 'scale(0.95)', opacity: '0', height: '0', overflow: 'hidden', padding: '0', margin: '0', border: 'none' },
                        },
                        slideUpFade: {
                            '0%': { transform: 'translateY(0)', opacity: '1', height: 'auto' },
                            '100%': { transform: 'translateY(-10px)', opacity: '0', height: '0', overflow: 'hidden', padding: '0', margin: '0', border: 'none' },
                        },
                        flash: {
                            '0%, 100%': { backgroundColor: 'transparent' },
                            '50%': { backgroundColor: 'rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.2)' }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    <style>
        .chip-btn {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px;
            font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
        }
        .chip-btn.active {
            background-color: rgba(9, 114, 211, 0.15); color: #0073bb; border-color: rgba(9, 114, 211, 0.3);
        }
        .dark .chip-btn.active {
            background-color: rgba(68, 185, 255, 0.15); color: #44b9ff; border-color: rgba(68, 185, 255, 0.3);
        }
        .chip-btn:not(.active) {
            background-color: #f3f4f6; color: #6b7280; border-color: #e5e7eb; opacity: 0.7;
        }
        .dark .chip-btn:not(.active) {
            background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #9ca3af; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
        }
        button, a, select, input { transition: transform 0.1s, filter 0.1s; }
        button:active { transform: scale(0.95); filter: brightness(0.9); }
        @keyframes dropdownSlideDown {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-6px); max-height: 0; }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); max-height: 320px; }
        }
        @keyframes dropdownSlideUp {
            from { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); max-height: 320px; }
            to { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-6px); max-height: 0; }
        }
        .dropdown-content {
            display: block;
            max-height: 0;
            opacity: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
            transform: translateY(-6px);
            transform-origin: top;
            transition: max-height 0.16s ease, opacity 0.16s ease, transform 0.16s ease;
        }
        .dropdown:hover .dropdown-content,
        .dropdown:focus-within .dropdown-content {
            animation: dropdownSlideDown 0.18s ease-out;
            max-height: 320px;
            opacity: 1;
            pointer-events: auto;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
        .dropdown:not(:hover):not(:focus-within) .dropdown-content {
            animation: dropdownSlideUp 0.14s ease-in;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="min-h-screen bg-aws-bg text-aws-text dark:bg-aws-bgDark dark:text-aws-textDark antialiased transition-colors duration-200 animate-fade-in">
    <div id="config-save-dim" class="lr-screen-dim" aria-hidden="true"></div>
    <main class="mx-auto max-w-[1400px] w-full px-4 py-8 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 space-y-6" id="app-content">
        <section class="lr-sticky-page-header flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-start sm:justify-between">
            <div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
                <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark">Global Configuration</h1>
                <p class="max-w-3xl text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">
                    Runtime-safe controls for alert policy, Telegram delivery, query defaults, display behavior, metrics, and RBAC.
                </p>
                <p id="global-config-status" class="hidden text-sm font-medium text-green-600 dark:text-green-400"></p>
            </div>
            <div class="flex items-center justify-end gap-3">
                <span id="global-save-visual" class="lr-save-visual" aria-hidden="true">
                    <span class="lr-save-spinner"></span>
                    <span class="lr-save-tick">
                        <svg class="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="3">
                            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m5 13 4 4L19 7"></path>
                        </svg>
                    </span>
                </span>
                <button id="global-save-btn" onclick="saveAllConfig()" class="px-5 py-2 text-sm font-bold bg-aws-primary hover:bg-aws-primaryHover transition-colors shadow-sm text-white">Save</button>
            </div>
        </section>
        <div class="bg-aws-panel dark:bg-aws-panelDark border border-aws-border dark:border-aws-borderDark rounded-lg shadow-sm">
            <div class="border-b border-aws-border px-5 py-4 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
                <h2 class="text-lg font-bold">Alert Policy</h2>
                <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Controls that affect alert grouping, deduplication, and browser live-notification behavior.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="grid gap-5 p-5 lg:grid-cols-2">
                <div>
                    <label for="ttl-input" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Alert deduplication TTL</label>
                    <select id="ttl-input" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="1">1 second</option>
                        <option value="10">10 seconds</option>
                        <option value="30">30 seconds</option>
                        <option value="60">1 minute</option>
                        <option value="600">10 minutes</option>
                        <option value="1800">30 minutes</option>
                        <option value="3600">1 hour</option>
                        <option value="10800">3 hours</option>
                        <option value="21600">6 hours</option>
                        <option value="32400">9 hours</option>
                        <option value="43200">12 hours</option>
                        <option value="86400">24 hours</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label for="noti-ttl-input" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Notification TTL</label>
                    <select id="noti-ttl-input" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="10">10 seconds</option>
                        <option value="30">30 seconds</option>
                        <option value="60">1 minute</option>
                        <option value="300">5 minutes</option>
                        <option value="600">10 minutes</option>
                        <option value="1800">30 minutes</option>
                        <option value="3600">1 hour</option>
                        <option value="10800">3 hours</option>
                        <option value="21600">6 hours</option>
                        <option value="43200">12 hours</option>
                        <option value="86400">24 hours</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label for="realert-threshold-input" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Re-alert threshold</label>
                    <select id="realert-threshold-input" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="1">1 occurrence</option>
                        <option value="5">5 occurrences</option>
                        <option value="10">10 occurrences</option>
                        <option value="25">25 occurrences</option>
                        <option value="50">50 occurrences</option>
                        <option value="100">100 occurrences</option>
                        <option value="250">250 occurrences</option>
                        <option value="500">500 occurrences</option>
                        <option value="1000">1000 occurrences</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label for="grouping-strategy-select" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Grouping strategy</label>
                    <select id="grouping-strategy-select" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="app_message">Application + message</option>
                        <option value="app_level_message">Application + level + message</option>
                        <option value="message_only">Message only</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <span class="mb-2 block text-sm font-bold">Enabled severities</span>
                    <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-4 text-sm">
                        <label class="inline-flex items-center gap-2"><input id="alert-severity-error" type="checkbox" value="ERROR"> ERROR</label>
                        <label class="inline-flex items-center gap-2"><input id="alert-severity-critical" type="checkbox" value="CRITICAL"> CRITICAL</label>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <span class="mb-2 block text-sm font-bold">Browser popups</span>
                    <label class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm"><input id="popup-default-enabled" type="checkbox"> Enabled by default</label>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label for="popup-duration-select" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Popup duration</label>
                    <select id="popup-duration-select" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="3000">3 seconds</option>
                        <option value="5000">5 seconds</option>
                        <option value="8000">8 seconds</option>
                        <option value="10000">10 seconds</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label for="ws-reconnect-select" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">WebSocket reconnect interval</label>
                    <select id="ws-reconnect-select" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="1000">1 second</option>
                        <option value="3000">3 seconds</option>
                        <option value="5000">5 seconds</option>
                        <option value="10000">10 seconds</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-aws-panel dark:bg-aws-panelDark border border-aws-border dark:border-aws-borderDark rounded-lg shadow-sm">
            <div class="border-b border-aws-border px-5 py-4 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
                <h2 class="text-lg font-bold">Telegram Notifications</h2>
                <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Runtime controls for Telegram delivery. Bot tokens and other secrets are intentionally not exposed.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="grid gap-5 p-5 lg:grid-cols-2">
                <label class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium"><input id="telegram-enabled" type="checkbox"> Telegram delivery enabled</label>
                <div>
                    <label for="telegram-link-ttl-select" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Link token expiry</label>
                    <select id="telegram-link-ttl-select" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="300">5 minutes</option>
                        <option value="600">10 minutes</option>
                        <option value="900">15 minutes</option>
                        <option value="1800">30 minutes</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-aws-panel dark:bg-aws-panelDark border border-aws-border dark:border-aws-borderDark rounded-lg shadow-sm">
            <div class="border-b border-aws-border px-5 py-4 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
                <h2 class="text-lg font-bold">Retention and Query Defaults</h2>
                <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Data retention and browser query defaults that are safe to change at runtime.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="grid gap-5 p-5 lg:grid-cols-2">
                <div class="lg:col-span-2">
                    <label for="ch-ttl-input" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">ClickHouse log retention TTL</label>
                    <select id="ch-ttl-input" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="1">1 hour</option>
                        <option value="3">3 hours</option>
                        <option value="6">6 hours</option>
                        <option value="9">9 hours</option>
                        <option value="12">12 hours</option>
                        <option value="24">1 day</option>
                        <option value="168">7 days</option>
                        <option value="336">14 days</option>
                        <option value="672">28 days</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label for="historical-lookback-select" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Historical logs lookback</label>
                    <select id="historical-lookback-select" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="24">24 hours</option>
                        <option value="72">72 hours</option>
                        <option value="168">7 days</option>
                        <option value="336">14 days</option>
                        <option value="672">28 days</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label for="max-live-rows-select" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Dashboard max live rows</label>
                    <select id="max-live-rows-select" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="100">100 rows</option>
                        <option value="250">250 rows</option>
                        <option value="500">500 rows</option>
                        <option value="1000">1,000 rows</option>
                        <option value="2000">2,000 rows</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-aws-panel dark:bg-aws-panelDark border border-aws-border dark:border-aws-borderDark rounded-lg shadow-sm">
            <div class="border-b border-aws-border px-5 py-4 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
                <h2 class="text-lg font-bold">Metrics</h2>
                <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Defaults for analytics pages and error-rate highlighting.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="grid gap-5 p-5 lg:grid-cols-2">
                <div>
                    <label for="metrics-default-period" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Default metrics period</label>
                    <select id="metrics-default-period" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="1h">Last 1 hour</option>
                        <option value="24h">Last 24 hours</option>
                        <option value="7d">Last 7 days</option>
                        <option value="14d">Last 14 days</option>
                        <option value="28d">Last 28 days</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label for="high-error-threshold-select" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">High error-rate threshold</label>
                    <select id="high-error-threshold-select" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="1">1%</option>
                        <option value="5">5%</option>
                        <option value="10">10%</option>
                        <option value="20">20%</option>
                        <option value="50">50%</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="lg:col-span-2">
                    <span class="mb-2 block text-sm font-bold">Enabled metrics periods</span>
                    <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-4 text-sm">
                        <label class="inline-flex items-center gap-2"><input class="metrics-period-checkbox" type="checkbox" value="1h"> 1h</label>
                        <label class="inline-flex items-center gap-2"><input class="metrics-period-checkbox" type="checkbox" value="24h"> 24h</label>
                        <label class="inline-flex items-center gap-2"><input class="metrics-period-checkbox" type="checkbox" value="7d"> 7d</label>
                        <label class="inline-flex items-center gap-2"><input class="metrics-period-checkbox" type="checkbox" value="14d"> 14d</label>
                        <label class="inline-flex items-center gap-2"><input class="metrics-period-checkbox" type="checkbox" value="28d"> 28d</label>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-aws-panel dark:bg-aws-panelDark border border-aws-border dark:border-aws-borderDark rounded-lg shadow-sm">
            <div class="border-b border-aws-border px-5 py-4 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
                <h2 class="text-lg font-bold">Display Defaults</h2>
                <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Browser defaults used when a user has not already stored a local preference.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="grid gap-5 p-5 lg:grid-cols-3">
                <div>
                    <label for="display-theme-select" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Default theme</label>
                    <select id="display-theme-select" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="system">System</option>
                        <option value="light">Light</option>
                        <option value="dark">Dark</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label for="display-timezone-select" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Timestamp timezone policy</label>
                    <select id="display-timezone-select" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="browser">Browser timezone</option>
                        <option value="utc">UTC</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label for="display-timestamp-format-select" class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Timestamp format</label>
                    <select id="display-timestamp-format-select" class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        <option value="YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS">YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</option>
                        <option value="YYYY-MM-DD\nHH:mm:ss.SSS">YYYY-MM-DD + time line</option>
                        <option value="locale">Locale default</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <section class="flex flex-col gap-2 pt-2">
            <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark">User Management</h1>
            <p class="max-w-3xl text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">
                Manage dashboard roles and application visibility for engineers and administrators.
            </p>
        </section>
        <div class="bg-aws-panel dark:bg-aws-panelDark border border-aws-border dark:border-aws-borderDark rounded-lg shadow-sm">
            <div class="px-5 py-4 border-b border-aws-border dark:border-aws-borderDark bg-gray-50/50 dark:bg-black/10 rounded-t-lg flex justify-between items-center">
                <h2 class="text-lg font-bold">Users</h2>
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 bg-white dark:bg-[#16191f] border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 p-1.5 rounded shadow-sm w-64">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 ml-2 shrink-0" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"></path></svg>
                    <select id="global-search-col" class="bg-transparent text-sm font-bold text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark focus:outline-none cursor-pointer pl-1" onchange="renderUsers()">
                        <option value="username">Username</option>
                    </select>
                    <div class="w-px h-5 bg-gray-300 dark:bg-gray-600 mx-1"></div>
                    <input type="text" id="global-search-val" oninput="renderUsers()" placeholder="Search..." class="flex-grow px-2 text-sm bg-transparent border-none focus:outline-none text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark w-full">
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="p-0 overflow-visible">
                <table class="w-full text-left text-sm whitespace-nowrap mb-2">
                    <thead class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-black/20 text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark text-xs uppercase font-bold border-b border-aws-border dark:border-aws-borderDark">
                        <tr>
                            <th class="px-4 py-3 align-top w-48">
                                <span>Username</span>
                            </th>
                            <th class="px-4 py-3 align-top w-32">
                                <span>Role</span>
                            </th>
                            <th class="px-4 py-3 align-top">
                                <span>Allowed Apps</span>
                            </th>
                            <th class="px-4 py-3 align-top w-16 text-center"></th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody id="users-table" class="divide-y divide-aws-border dark:divide-aws-borderDark">
                    </tbody>
                </table>
                <div class="px-4 pb-4">
                    <button onclick="showAddRow()" class="w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-aws-primary hover:bg-aws-primaryHover text-sm leading-none text-white mx-auto shadow-sm transition-all animate-fade-in" aria-label="Add user">+</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>
    <script>
        const token = localStorage.getItem('logrider_token');
        const role = localStorage.getItem('logrider_role');
        window.allUsers = [];
        window.allApps = new Set();
````
