````html
        const alertTTLValues = [1, 10, 30, 60, 600, 1800, 3600, 10800, 21600, 32400, 43200, 86400];
        const notificationTTLValues = [10, 30, 60, 300, 600, 1800, 3600, 10800, 21600, 43200, 86400];
        const chTTLValues = [1, 3, 6, 9, 12, 24, 168, 336, 672];
        window.runtimeConfig = {};
        if (!token || role !== 'admin') {
            window.location.href = '/dashboard';
        } else {
            if (typeof syncTopbarUser === 'function') syncTopbarUser();
            loadData();
        }
        const themeToggleBtn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
        const darkIcon = document.getElementById('theme-toggle-dark-icon');
        const lightIcon = document.getElementById('theme-toggle-light-icon');
        if (localStorage.getItem('color-theme') === 'dark' || (!('color-theme' in localStorage) && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches)) {
            document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');
            lightIcon?.classList.remove('hidden');
        } else {
            document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');
            darkIcon?.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
        themeToggleBtn?.addEventListener('click', function() {
            darkIcon?.classList.toggle('hidden');
            lightIcon?.classList.toggle('hidden');
            document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark');
            localStorage.setItem('color-theme', document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark') ? 'dark' : 'light');
            document.querySelectorAll('input[type="range"]').forEach(updateSliderColor);
        });
        function logout() {
            localStorage.clear();
            window.location.href = '/dashboard';
        }
        function updateSliderColor(slider) {
            if (!slider) return;
            const changed = slider.dataset.original !== undefined && slider.value !== slider.dataset.original;
            if (changed) {
                slider.style.accentColor = '#0972d3';
            } else {
                slider.style.accentColor = document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark') ? '#ffffff' : '#16191f';
            }
        }
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            document.querySelectorAll('input[type="range"]').forEach(slider => {
                slider.addEventListener('input', (e) => updateSliderColor(e.target));
            });
        });
        function setSelectValue(id, value) {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            if (!el) return;
            el.value = String(value);
            el.dataset.original = String(value);
        }
        function setCheckboxValue(id, value) {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            if (!el) return;
            el.checked = Boolean(value);
        }
        function setCheckedValues(selector, values) {
            const selected = new Set(values || []);
            document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach((checkbox) => {
                checkbox.checked = selected.has(checkbox.value);
            });
        }
        function checkedValues(selector) {
            return [...document.querySelectorAll(selector)]
                .filter((checkbox) => checkbox.checked)
                .map((checkbox) => checkbox.value);
        }
        function configValue(key, fallback) {
            return window.runtimeConfig?.[key]?.value ?? fallback;
        }
        function applyRuntimeConfig(config) {
            window.runtimeConfig = config || {};
            setSelectValue('ttl-input', configValue('alert.dedup_ttl_seconds', 60));
            setSelectValue('noti-ttl-input', configValue('alert.notification_ttl_seconds', 86400));
            setSelectValue('ch-ttl-input', configValue('retention.clickhouse_ttl_hours', 168));
            setSelectValue('realert-threshold-input', configValue('alert.realert_threshold', 100));
            setSelectValue('grouping-strategy-select', configValue('alert.grouping_strategy', 'app_message'));
            const severities = configValue('alert.enabled_severities', ['ERROR', 'CRITICAL']);
            setCheckboxValue('alert-severity-error', severities.includes('ERROR'));
            setCheckboxValue('alert-severity-critical', severities.includes('CRITICAL'));
            setCheckboxValue('popup-default-enabled', configValue('alert.popup_default_enabled', true));
            setSelectValue('popup-duration-select', configValue('alert.popup_duration_ms', 5000));
            setSelectValue('ws-reconnect-select', configValue('alert.websocket_reconnect_interval_ms', 3000));
            setCheckboxValue('telegram-enabled', configValue('telegram.enabled', true));
            setSelectValue('telegram-link-ttl-select', configValue('telegram.link_token_ttl_seconds', 600));
            setSelectValue('historical-lookback-select', configValue('query.historical_logs_lookback_hours', 168));
            setSelectValue('max-live-rows-select', configValue('dashboard.max_live_rows', 500));
            setSelectValue('metrics-default-period', configValue('metrics.default_period', '7d'));
            setCheckedValues('.metrics-period-checkbox', configValue('metrics.enabled_periods', ['1h', '24h', '7d', '14d', '28d']));
            setSelectValue('high-error-threshold-select', configValue('metrics.high_error_rate_threshold_percent', 10));
            setSelectValue('display-theme-select', configValue('display.default_theme', 'system'));
            setSelectValue('display-timezone-select', configValue('display.timestamp_timezone_policy', 'browser'));
            setSelectValue('display-timestamp-format-select', configValue('display.timestamp_format', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS'));
            window.refreshCustomControls?.();
        }
        async function loadRuntimeConfig() {
            const res = await fetch('/api/config/all', { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token } });
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch runtime config');
            const data = await res.json();
            applyRuntimeConfig(data.config || {});
        }
        function showConfigStatus(id, message) {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            if (!el) return;
            el.innerText = message;
            el.classList.remove('hidden', 'text-red-600', 'dark:text-red-400');
            el.classList.add('text-green-600', 'dark:text-green-400');
            setTimeout(() => el.classList.add('hidden'), 2500);
        }
        function showConfigError(id, message) {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            if (!el) {
                alert(message);
                return;
            }
            el.innerText = message;
            el.classList.remove('hidden', 'text-green-600', 'dark:text-green-400');
            el.classList.add('text-red-600', 'dark:text-red-400');
        }
        async function patchRuntimeConfig(updates, statusId = 'global-config-status') {
            const res = await fetch('/api/config', {
                method: 'PATCH',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token },
                body: JSON.stringify({ updates })
            });
            const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
            if (!res.ok) {
                const detail = Array.isArray(data.details) && data.details.length
                    ? data.details.map((item) => `${item.key}: ${item.message}`).join('; ')
                    : data.error || 'Config update failed';
                showConfigError(statusId, detail);
                throw new Error(detail);
            }
            applyRuntimeConfig(data.config || window.runtimeConfig);
            showConfigStatus(statusId, 'Saved.');
            return data;
        }
        function alertPolicyUpdates() {
            const severities = [
                document.getElementById('alert-severity-error').checked ? 'ERROR' : null,
                document.getElementById('alert-severity-critical').checked ? 'CRITICAL' : null,
            ].filter(Boolean);
            return [
                { key: 'alert.dedup_ttl_seconds', value: parseInt(document.getElementById('ttl-input').value, 10) },
                { key: 'alert.notification_ttl_seconds', value: parseInt(document.getElementById('noti-ttl-input').value, 10) },
                { key: 'alert.realert_threshold', value: parseInt(document.getElementById('realert-threshold-input').value, 10) },
                { key: 'alert.enabled_severities', value: severities },
                { key: 'alert.grouping_strategy', value: document.getElementById('grouping-strategy-select').value },
                { key: 'alert.popup_default_enabled', value: document.getElementById('popup-default-enabled').checked },
                { key: 'alert.popup_duration_ms', value: parseInt(document.getElementById('popup-duration-select').value, 10) },
                { key: 'alert.websocket_reconnect_interval_ms', value: parseInt(document.getElementById('ws-reconnect-select').value, 10) },
            ];
        }
        function telegramConfigUpdates() {
            return [
                { key: 'telegram.enabled', value: document.getElementById('telegram-enabled').checked },
                { key: 'telegram.link_token_ttl_seconds', value: parseInt(document.getElementById('telegram-link-ttl-select').value, 10) },
            ];
        }
        function retentionConfigUpdates() {
            return [
                { key: 'query.historical_logs_lookback_hours', value: parseInt(document.getElementById('historical-lookback-select').value, 10) },
                { key: 'dashboard.max_live_rows', value: parseInt(document.getElementById('max-live-rows-select').value, 10) },
            ];
        }
        function metricsConfigUpdates() {
            return [
                { key: 'metrics.default_period', value: document.getElementById('metrics-default-period').value },
                { key: 'metrics.enabled_periods', value: checkedValues('.metrics-period-checkbox') },
                { key: 'metrics.high_error_rate_threshold_percent', value: Number(document.getElementById('high-error-threshold-select').value) },
            ];
        }
        function displayConfigUpdates() {
            return [
                { key: 'display.default_theme', value: document.getElementById('display-theme-select').value },
                { key: 'display.timestamp_timezone_policy', value: document.getElementById('display-timezone-select').value },
                { key: 'display.timestamp_format', value: document.getElementById('display-timestamp-format-select').value },
            ];
        }
        async function saveAllConfig() {
            const button = document.getElementById('global-save-btn');
            const visual = document.getElementById('global-save-visual');
            const dim = document.getElementById('config-save-dim');
            const startedAt = performance.now();
            if (button) {
                button.disabled = true;
            }
            visual?.classList.remove('done');
            visual?.classList.add('active', 'spinning');
            dim?.classList.add('active');
            try {
                await updateChTTL({ silent: true });
                const updates = [
                    ...alertPolicyUpdates(),
                    ...telegramConfigUpdates(),
                    ...retentionConfigUpdates(),
                    ...metricsConfigUpdates(),
                    ...displayConfigUpdates(),
                ];
                await patchRuntimeConfig(updates, 'global-config-status');
                const elapsed = performance.now() - startedAt;
                if (elapsed < 1000) await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1000 - elapsed));
                visual?.classList.remove('spinning');
                visual?.classList.add('done');
                await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
            } catch (error) {
                showConfigError('global-config-status', error.message || 'Config update failed');
            } finally {
                visual?.classList.remove('active', 'spinning', 'done');
                dim?.classList.remove('active');
                if (button) {
                    button.disabled = false;
                }
            }
        }
        async function saveAlertPolicy() {
            await patchRuntimeConfig(alertPolicyUpdates(), 'global-config-status');
        }
        async function saveTelegramConfig() {
            await patchRuntimeConfig(telegramConfigUpdates(), 'global-config-status');
        }
        async function saveRetentionConfig() {
            try {
                await updateChTTL({ silent: true });
                await patchRuntimeConfig(retentionConfigUpdates(), 'global-config-status');
            } catch (error) {
                showConfigError('global-config-status', error.message || 'Retention update failed');
            }
        }
        async function saveMetricsConfig() {
            await patchRuntimeConfig(metricsConfigUpdates(), 'global-config-status');
        }
        async function saveDisplayConfig() {
            await patchRuntimeConfig(displayConfigUpdates(), 'global-config-status');
        }
        async function loadData() {
            try {
                await loadRuntimeConfig();
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Runtime config load failed:', error);
                applyRuntimeConfig({});
            }
            const resTTL = await fetch('/api/config/ttl');
            if (resTTL.ok) {
                const data = await resTTL.json();
                if (alertTTLValues.includes(data.ttl)) setSelectValue('ttl-input', data.ttl);
            }
            const resNotiTTL = await fetch('/api/config/noti-ttl');
            if (resNotiTTL.ok) {
                const data = await resNotiTTL.json();
                if (notificationTTLValues.includes(data.ttl)) setSelectValue('noti-ttl-input', data.ttl);
            }
            const resChTTL = await fetch('/api/config/clickhouse-ttl', { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token } });
            if (resChTTL.ok) {
                const data = await resChTTL.json();
                const el = document.getElementById('ch-ttl-input');
                if (chTTLValues.includes(data.ttl_hours)) setSelectValue('ch-ttl-input', data.ttl_hours);
                else if (el) {
                    const option = document.createElement('option');
                    option.value = String(data.ttl_hours);
                    option.textContent = `${data.ttl_hours} hours`;
                    el.appendChild(option);
                    setSelectValue('ch-ttl-input', data.ttl_hours);
                }
                window.refreshCustomControls?.();
            }
            const resUsers = await fetch('/api/users', { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token } });
            if (resUsers.ok) {
                const data = await resUsers.json();
                window.allUsers = data.users;
                window.allApps = new Set();
                window.allUsers.forEach(u => {
                    if (u.allowed_apps) {
                        u.allowed_apps.split(',').forEach(a => window.allApps.add(a));
                    }
                });
                renderUsers();
            } else if (resUsers.status === 403 || resUsers.status === 401) {
                document.body.innerHTML = '<div class="h-screen flex items-center justify-center text-center"><div class="max-w-md p-6 bg-white dark:bg-aws-panelDark rounded-lg shadow-lg border border-red-500"><h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-red-600 mb-4">Access Denied</h1><p class="text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 mb-6">Only System Admins can view or modify configuration settings.</p><a href="/dashboard" class="px-4 py-2 bg-aws-primary text-white rounded hover:bg-aws-primaryHover font-medium">Return to Dashboard</a></div></div>';
            }
        }
        async function updateTTL() {
            const val = parseInt(document.getElementById('ttl-input').value, 10);
            const res = await fetch('/api/config/ttl', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token },
                body: JSON.stringify({ ttl: val })
            });
            if (res.ok) {
                const el = document.getElementById('ttl-input');
                el.dataset.original = el.value;
                showConfigStatus('global-config-status', 'Saved.');
            }
        }
        async function updateNotiTTL() {
            const val = parseInt(document.getElementById('noti-ttl-input').value, 10);
            const res = await fetch('/api/config/noti-ttl', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token },
                body: JSON.stringify({ ttl: val })
            });
            if (res.ok) {
                const el = document.getElementById('noti-ttl-input');
                el.dataset.original = el.value;
                showConfigStatus('global-config-status', 'Saved.');
            }
        }
        async function updateChTTL({ silent = false } = {}) {
            const ttl = parseInt(document.getElementById('ch-ttl-input').value, 10);
            const res = await fetch('/api/config/clickhouse-ttl', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token },
                body: JSON.stringify({ ttl_hours: ttl })
            });
            if (res.ok) {
                const el = document.getElementById('ch-ttl-input');
                el.dataset.original = el.value;
                window.runtimeConfig['retention.clickhouse_ttl_hours'] = {
                    ...(window.runtimeConfig['retention.clickhouse_ttl_hours'] || {}),
                    value: ttl
                };
                if (!silent) showConfigStatus('global-config-status', 'ClickHouse TTL Saved!');
            } else {
                const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
                throw new Error(data.error || 'ClickHouse TTL update failed');
            }
        }
        // Filters
        function setRoleFilter(val) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.r-filter').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.toggle('active', val);
            });
            renderUsers();
        }
        function setAppFilter(checked) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.a-filter').forEach(cb => cb.checked = checked);
        }
        function renderAppFilter() {
            // Disabled: Filter removed from UI
        }
        function renderUsers() {
            const searchCol = document.getElementById('global-search-col') ? document.getElementById('global-search-col').value : null;
            const searchVal = document.getElementById('global-search-val') ? document.getElementById('global-search-val').value.toLowerCase() : '';
            const sorted = [...window.allUsers].sort((a, b) => {
                if (a.role === b.role) return a.username.localeCompare(b.username);
                return a.role.localeCompare(b.role);
            });
            const tbody = document.getElementById('users-table');
            tbody.innerHTML = '';
            sorted.forEach(u => {
                let matchSearch = true;
                if (searchVal && searchCol) {
                    if (searchCol === 'username') matchSearch = u.username.toLowerCase().includes(searchVal);
                }
                if (!matchSearch) return;
                const tr = document.createElement('tr');
                tr.className = "hover:bg-blue-50/50 dark:hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors group";
                let appsHtml = '';
                if (u.role === 'admin') {
                    appsHtml = '<span class="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500">*</span>';
                } else {
                    if (u.allowed_apps) {
                        appsHtml = u.allowed_apps.split(',').filter(Boolean).map(a => `
                            <div class="group/chip inline-flex items-center mr-1 mb-1">
                                <div class="inline-flex h-7 items-center rounded-full border border-gray-300 bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium transition-colors dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-white/10">
                                    <span>${a}</span>
                                    <button class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-red-500 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-700 hover:text-red-600 dark:hover:text-red-400 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out overflow-hidden max-w-0 opacity-0 ml-0 group-hover/chip:max-w-[20px] group-hover/chip:w-5 group-hover/chip:opacity-100 group-hover/chip:ml-1 h-5" onclick="removeApp(event, '${u.username}', '${a}')">
                                        <svg class="w-3 h-3 flex-shrink-0" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M19 7l-.867 12.142A2 2 0 0116.138 21H7.862a2 2 0 01-1.995-1.858L5 7m5 4v6m4-6v6m1-10V4a1 1 0 00-1-1h-4a1 1 0 00-1 1v3M4 7h16"></path></svg>
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        `).join('');
                    }
                    appsHtml += `
                        <button onclick="showAppInput('${u.username}', this)" class="inline-flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-aws-primary text-white shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-aws-primaryHover active:scale-95" aria-label="Add application">
                            <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"></path></svg>
                        </button>
                    `;
                }
                tr.innerHTML = `
                    <td class="px-4 py-3 font-medium text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark">${u.username}</td>
                    <td class="px-4 py-3 text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">${u.role}</td>
                    <td class="px-4 py-3 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1">${appsHtml}</td>
                    <td class="px-4 py-3 text-center">
                        ${u.role !== 'admin' ? `
                        <button onclick="deleteUserWithAnim('${u.username}', this)" class="text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 ease-in-out active:scale-95">
                            <svg class="w-4 h-4 mx-auto" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M19 7l-.867 12.142A2 2 0 0116.138 21H7.862a2 2 0 01-1.995-1.858L5 7m5 4v6m4-6v6m1-10V4a1 1 0 00-1-1h-4a1 1 0 00-1 1v3M4 7h16"></path></svg>
                        </button>
                        ` : ''}
                    </td>
                `;
                tbody.appendChild(tr);
            });
        }
        function showAppInput(username, btn) {
            const input = document.createElement('input');
            input.type = 'text';
            input.className = 'px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-aws-primary bg-white dark:bg-black text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark w-24 outline-none';
            input.placeholder = 'App name';
            input.onblur = () => saveNewApp(username, input.value);
            input.onkeydown = (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Enter') input.blur();
                if (e.key === 'Escape') { input.value = ''; input.blur(); }
            };
            btn.replaceWith(input);
            input.focus();
        }
        async function saveNewApp(username, val) {
            val = val.trim();
            if (!val) {
                renderUsers(); // Restore the + button
                return;
            }
            const u = window.allUsers.find(x => x.username === username);
            const apps = u.allowed_apps ? u.allowed_apps.split(',') : [];
            if (!apps.includes(val)) {
                apps.push(val);
                u.allowed_apps = apps.join(',');
                await saveUserDirectly(u);
            } else {
                renderUsers();
            }
        }
        async function removeApp(e, username, app) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            const btn = e.currentTarget;
            const pill = btn.closest('div');
            pill.classList.add('animate-zoom-out');
            setTimeout(async () => {
                const u = window.allUsers.find(x => x.username === username);
                u.allowed_apps = u.allowed_apps.split(',').filter(a => a !== app).join(',');
                await saveUserDirectly(u);
            }, 200);
        }
        async function saveUserDirectly(u) {
            await fetch('/api/users', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    username: u.username,
                    role: u.role,
                    allowed_apps: u.allowed_apps
                })
            });
            loadData();
        }
        function showAddRow() {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('users-table');
            const tr = document.createElement('tr');
            tr.className = "bg-blue-50/50 dark:bg-blue-900/20 animate-slide-in";
            tr.innerHTML = `
                <td class="px-4 py-3"><input type="text" id="new-u" class="w-full text-xs px-2 py-1 border rounded dark:bg-[#16191f] border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-aws-link" placeholder="username"></td>
                <td class="px-4 py-3">
                    <input type="password" id="new-p" class="w-full text-xs px-2 py-1 border rounded dark:bg-[#16191f] border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-aws-link" placeholder="password">
                </td>
                <td class="px-4 py-3"><input type="text" id="new-a" class="w-full text-xs px-2 py-1 border rounded dark:bg-[#16191f] border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-aws-link" placeholder="apps (comma separated)"></td>
                <td class="px-4 py-3 text-center flex items-center justify-center space-x-2">
                    <button onclick="saveNewUser(this)" class="text-green-500 hover:text-green-700 active:scale-95 transition-all w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-green-100 dark:hover:bg-green-900/30">
                        <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"></path></svg>
                    </button>
                    <button onclick="cancelNewUserRow(this)" class="text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 active:scale-95 transition-all w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-red-50 dark:hover:bg-red-900/30">
                        <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M19 7l-.867 12.142A2 2 0 0116.138 21H7.862a2 2 0 01-1.995-1.858L5 7m5 4v6m4-6v6m1-10V4a1 1 0 00-1-1h-4a1 1 0 00-1 1v3M4 7h16"></path></svg>
                    </button>
                </td>
            `;
            tbody.appendChild(tr);
        }
        async function saveNewUser(btn) {
            const tr = btn.closest('tr');
            const username = document.getElementById('new-u').value;
            const password = document.getElementById('new-p').value;
            const allowed_apps = document.getElementById('new-a').value;
            const role = 'engineer';
            if (!username || !password) return alert('Username and Password required');
            tr.innerHTML = '<td colspan="4" class="px-4 py-3 text-center text-xs">Saving...</td>';
            const res = await fetch('/api/users', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token },
                body: JSON.stringify({ username, password, role, allowed_apps })
            });
            if (res.ok) {
                tr.className = "bg-green-100 dark:bg-green-900/50 transition-colors duration-500";
                setTimeout(() => {
                    tr.className = "hover:bg-blue-50/50 dark:hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors group";
                    window.allUsers.push({ username, role, allowed_apps });
                    let appsHtml = '';
                    if (allowed_apps) {
                        appsHtml = allowed_apps.split(',').filter(Boolean).map(a => `
                            <div class="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-white/10 cursor-pointer mr-1 mb-1 transition-all overflow-hidden" onclick="toggleTrash(this)">
                                <span>${a}</span>
                                <button class="hidden ml-1 text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 active:scale-95 transition-all" onclick="removeApp(event, '${username}', '${a}')">
                                    <svg class="w-3 h-3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M19 7l-.867 12.142A2 2 0 0116.138 21H7.862a2 2 0 01-1.995-1.858L5 7m5 4v6m4-6v6m1-10V4a1 1 0 00-1-1h-4a1 1 0 00-1 1v3M4 7h16"></path></svg>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        `).join('');
                    }
                    appsHtml += `
                        <button onclick="addDummyApp('${username}')" class="inline-flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-sm font-bold border border-aws-link text-aws-link hover:bg-blue-50 dark:hover:bg-blue-900/30 transition-all active:scale-95" aria-label="Add application">
                            <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"></path></svg>
                        </button>
                    `;
                    tr.innerHTML = `
                        <td class="px-4 py-3 font-medium text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark">${username}</td>
                        <td class="px-4 py-3 text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">${role}</td>
                        <td class="px-4 py-3 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1">${appsHtml}</td>
                        <td class="px-4 py-3 text-center">
                            <button onclick="deleteUserWithAnim('${username}', this)" class="text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity active:scale-95">
                                <svg class="w-4 h-4 mx-auto" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M19 7l-.867 12.142A2 2 0 0116.138 21H7.862a2 2 0 01-1.995-1.858L5 7m5 4v6m4-6v6m1-10V4a1 1 0 00-1-1h-4a1 1 0 00-1 1v3M4 7h16"></path></svg>
                            </button>
                        </td>
                    `;
                }, 1000);
            } else {
                alert('Error saving user');
                tr.remove();
            }
        }
        function deleteUserWithAnim(username, btn) {
            if (!confirm('Delete user ' + username + '?')) return;
            const tr = btn.closest('tr');
            tr.classList.add('animate-shrink-fade');
            setTimeout(async () => {
                await fetch('/api/users/' + username, {
                    method: 'DELETE',
                    headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token }
                });
                loadData();
            }, 300);
        }
        function cancelNewUserRow(btn) {
            const tr = btn.closest('tr');
            tr.classList.add('animate-[slideUpFade_0.22s_ease-out_forwards]');
            setTimeout(() => tr.remove(), 220);
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: logrider/server/dashboard.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="light">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>LogRider Dashboard</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.cdnfonts.com/css/amazon-ember" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <link href="/public/css/cloudscape-logrider.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: 'class',
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        aws: {
                            nav: '#0f1b2d',
                            bg: '#f2f3f3',
                            bgDark: '#0f1b2d',
                            panel: '#ffffff',
                            panelDark: '#1c2539',
                            border: '#eaeded',
                            borderDark: '#414d5c',
                            text: '#16191f',
                            textDark: '#ffffff',
                            textMuted: '#545b64',
                            textMutedDark: '#9ba7b6',
                            primary: '#0972d3',
                            primaryHover: '#035b96',
                            linkDark: '#44b9ff'
                        }
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['"Amazon Ember"', 'sans-serif'],
                        mono: ['Menlo', 'Monaco', 'Consolas', '"Courier New"', 'monospace']
                    },
                    keyframes: {
                        fadeIn: { '0%': { opacity: '0' }, '100%': { opacity: '1' } },
                        slideDown: { '0%': { opacity: '0', transform: 'translateY(-8px)' }, '100%': { opacity: '1', transform: 'translateY(0)' } },
                        pulseCard: { '0%': { transform: 'scale(1)' }, '50%': { transform: 'scale(1.015)' }, '100%': { transform: 'scale(1)' } }
                    },
                    animation: {
                        fadeIn: 'fadeIn 0.2s ease-out',
                        slideDown: 'slideDown 0.2s ease-out',
                        pulseCard: 'pulseCard 0.25s ease-out'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    <style>
        .logs-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; height: 8px; }
        .logs-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
        .logs-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #aab7b8; border-radius: 999px; }
        .dark .logs-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #545b64; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-aws-bg font-sans text-aws-text antialiased transition-colors duration-200 dark:bg-aws-bgDark dark:text-aws-textDark h-screen flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
    <div id="global-alert-container" class="pointer-events-none fixed bottom-4 right-4 z-[9999] flex max-w-sm flex-col-reverse gap-2"></div>
    <main class="mx-auto max-w-[1400px] w-full px-4 py-8 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0 overflow-hidden">
        <div id="login-screen" class="mx-auto mt-12 max-w-md">
            <div class="overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark">
                <div class="border-b border-aws-border px-6 py-5 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
                    <h2 class="text-xl font-bold">Sign in</h2>
                    <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Enter your credentials to access the dashboard.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="px-6 py-6">
                    <form id="login-form" class="space-y-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Username</label>
                            <input id="username" type="text" required class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-aws-primary focus:outline-none dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="mb-1 block text-sm font-bold">Password</label>
                            <input id="password" type="password" required class="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-aws-primary focus:outline-none dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f]">
                        </div>
                        <button type="submit" class="w-full rounded-full bg-aws-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-aws-primaryHover">Sign in</button>
                        <p id="login-error" class="hidden text-sm font-medium text-red-500"></p>
                    </form>
                </div>
                <div class="border-t border-aws-border bg-gray-50 px-6 py-4 text-xs text-aws-textMuted dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-black/20 dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">
                    <span class="font-semibold">Demo accounts:</span> Ayin/admin123 or Benjamin/eng123
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div id="dashboard-screen" class="hidden flex-col space-y-6 flex-1 overflow-hidden">
            <section class="flex flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">Log Stream</h1>
                    <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Live ingestion, normalization, persistence, and classification status for recent logs.</p>
                </div>
                <button id="refresh-btn" onclick="handleRefresh()" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-aws-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-aws-primaryHover">
                    <svg id="refresh-icon" class="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="2">
                        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4 4v5h.582m15.356 2A8.001 8.001 0 0 0 4.582 9m0 0H9m11 11v-5h-.581m0 0a8.003 8.003 0 0 1-15.357-2m15.357 2H15"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span>Refresh</span>
                </button>
            </section>
            <section class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4" id="summary-cards">
                <div class="rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel p-4 shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark">
                    <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Logs</p>
                    <p id="summary-total" class="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold">0</p>
                </div>
                <div class="rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel p-4 shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark">
                    <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Normalized</p>
                    <p id="summary-normalized" class="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold text-amber-500">0</p>
                </div>
                <div class="rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel p-4 shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark">
                    <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Persisted</p>
                    <p id="summary-persisted" class="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold text-sky-500">0</p>
                </div>
                <div class="rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel p-4 shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark">
                    <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Classified</p>
                    <p id="summary-classified" class="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold text-emerald-500">0</p>
                </div>
            </section>
            <section class="rounded-lg border border-aws-border bg-aws-panel shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-aws-panelDark flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
                <div class="border-b border-aws-border px-5 py-4 dark:border-aws-borderDark">
                    <div class="flex flex-col gap-3 xl:flex-row xl:items-center">
                        <div class="grid flex-1 grid-cols-1 gap-3 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(300px,1fr)_180px_180px_180px]">
                            <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 bg-white dark:bg-[#16191f] border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 p-1.5 rounded shadow-sm">
                                <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 ml-2 shrink-0" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"></path></svg>
                                <select id="search-col" onchange="applyFilters()" class="bg-transparent text-sm font-bold text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark focus:outline-none cursor-pointer">
                                    <option value="message">Message</option>
                                    <option value="trace_id">Trace ID</option>
                                    <option value="application">Application</option>
                                    <option value="tags">Tags</option>
                                </select>
                                <div class="w-px h-5 bg-gray-300 dark:bg-gray-600 shrink-0"></div>
                                <input id="search-query" oninput="applyFilters()" type="text" placeholder="Search logs..." class="flex-grow px-2 text-sm bg-transparent border-none focus:outline-none text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark w-full">
                            </div>
                            <select id="application-filter" onchange="applyFilters()" class="rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-aws-primary focus:outline-none dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f] text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark cursor-pointer">
                                <option value="">All Applications</option>
                            </select>
                            <select id="level-filter" onchange="applyFilters()" class="rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-aws-primary focus:outline-none dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f] text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark cursor-pointer">
                                <option value="">All Levels</option>
                                <option value="DEBUG">DEBUG</option>
                                <option value="INFO">INFO</option>
                                <option value="WARN">WARN</option>
                                <option value="ERROR">ERROR</option>
                                <option value="CRITICAL">CRITICAL</option>
                            </select>
                            <select id="status-filter" onchange="applyFilters()" class="rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-aws-primary focus:outline-none dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-[#16191f] text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark cursor-pointer">
                                <option value="">All Statuses</option>
                                <option value="Ingested">Ingested</option>
                                <option value="Normalized">Normalized</option>
                                <option value="Persisted">Persisted</option>
                                <option value="Classified">Classified</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-end">
                            <span class="relative flex h-3 w-3">
                                <span id="ws-ping" class="absolute inline-flex h-full w-full animate-ping rounded-full bg-green-400 opacity-75"></span>
                                <span id="ws-dot" class="relative inline-flex h-3 w-3 rounded-full bg-green-500"></span>
                            </span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="flex-1 overflow-auto logs-scroll">
                    <table class="min-w-full table-fixed text-left text-sm">
                        <thead class="sticky top-0 z-10 border-b border-aws-border bg-gray-50 text-xs font-bold uppercase text-aws-textMuted shadow-sm dark:border-aws-borderDark dark:bg-black/20 dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">
                            <tr>
                                <th class="w-[170px] px-5 py-3">Timestamp</th>
                                <th class="w-[110px] px-5 py-3">Level</th>
                                <th class="w-[180px] px-5 py-3">Application</th>
                                <th class="w-[220px] px-5 py-3">Trace ID</th>
                                <th class="w-[42%] px-5 py-3">Message</th>
                                <th class="w-[220px] px-5 py-3">Tags</th>
                                <th class="w-[130px] px-5 py-3">Status</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody id="logs-body" class="divide-y divide-aws-border dark:divide-aws-borderDark"></tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </section>
        </div>
    </main>
    <script>
        const STATUS_RANK = { Ingested: 1, Normalized: 2, Persisted: 3, Classified: 4 };
        const logsByTraceId = new Map();
        let renderQueued = false;
        function scheduleRender() {
            if (renderQueued) return;
            renderQueued = true;
            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                renderQueued = false;
                renderLogs();
            });
        }
        const MAX_LOGS = 500;
        let ws;
        const loginScreen = document.getElementById('login-screen');
        const dashboardScreen = document.getElementById('dashboard-screen');
        const logsBody = document.getElementById('logs-body');
        const applicationFilter = document.getElementById('application-filter');
        function initTheme() {
            const darkIcon = document.getElementById('theme-toggle-dark-icon');
            const lightIcon = document.getElementById('theme-toggle-light-icon');
            const prefersDark = localStorage.getItem('color-theme') === 'dark'
                || (!('color-theme' in localStorage) && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches);
            document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', prefersDark);
            if (darkIcon && lightIcon) {
                darkIcon.classList.toggle('hidden', !document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark'));
                lightIcon.classList.toggle('hidden', document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark'));
            }
            document.getElementById('theme-toggle')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const nextDark = !document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark');
                document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', nextDark);
                localStorage.setItem('color-theme', nextDark ? 'dark' : 'light');
                darkIcon?.classList.toggle('hidden', !nextDark);
                lightIcon?.classList.toggle('hidden', nextDark);
            });
        }
        function setWsIndicator(isConnected) {
            document.getElementById('ws-dot').className = `relative inline-flex h-3 w-3 rounded-full ${isConnected ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-red-500'}`;
            document.getElementById('ws-ping').className = isConnected
                ? 'absolute inline-flex h-full w-full animate-ping rounded-full bg-green-400 opacity-75'
                : 'hidden';
        }
        function escapeHtml(value) {
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.textContent = value ?? '';
            return div.innerHTML;
        }
        function formatTimestamp(value) {
            let str = String(value);
            if (!str.endsWith('Z') && str.length > 10) {
                str = str.replace(' ', 'T');
                if (!str.endsWith('Z')) str += 'Z';
            }
            const date = new Date(str);
            if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return escapeHtml(String(value || '-'));
            return escapeHtml(date.toLocaleString('en-CA', {
                hour12: false,
                year: 'numeric',
                month: '2-digit',
                day: '2-digit',
                hour: '2-digit',
                minute: '2-digit',
                second: '2-digit'
            }).replace(',', ''));
        }
        function levelClass(level) {
            if (level === 'CRITICAL' || level === 'ERROR') return 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-500/15 dark:text-red-300';
            if (level === 'WARN') return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-500/15 dark:text-amber-300';
            if (level === 'DEBUG') return 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-700 dark:bg-slate-500/15 dark:text-slate-300';
            return 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-500/15 dark:text-emerald-300';
        }
        function statusClass(status) {
            if (status === 'Classified') return 'text-emerald-500';
            if (status === 'Persisted') return 'text-sky-500';
            if (status === 'Normalized') return 'text-amber-500';
            return 'text-violet-500';
        }
        function normalizeHistoricalLog(log) {
            let ts = log.Timestamp;
            if (ts && typeof ts === 'string' && ts.includes(' ') && !ts.includes('T')) {
                ts = ts.replace(' ', 'T');
                if (!ts.endsWith('Z')) ts += 'Z';
            }
            const tags = Array.isArray(log.Tags) ? log.Tags : [];
            return {
                Trace_ID: log.Trace_ID,
                Application_Name: log.Application_Name || '-',
                Log_Level: (log.Log_Level || 'INFO').toUpperCase(),
                Message: log.Message || '',
                Timestamp: ts,
                Tags: tags,
                Status: log.Status || (tags.length > 0 ? 'Classified' : 'Persisted'),
                pendingClassified: false,
                pendingTags: [],
            };
        }
        function ensureApplicationOption(appName) {
            if (!appName || [...applicationFilter.options].some((option) => option.value === appName)) return;
            const option = document.createElement('option');
            option.value = appName;
            option.textContent = appName;
            applicationFilter.appendChild(option);
        }
        function upsertLog(log) {
            if (!log?.Trace_ID) return null;
            const existing = logsByTraceId.get(log.Trace_ID);
            const next = existing ? { ...existing } : {
                Trace_ID: log.Trace_ID,
                Application_Name: log.Application_Name || '-',
                Log_Level: (log.Log_Level || 'INFO').toUpperCase(),
                Message: log.Message || '',
                Timestamp: log.Timestamp,
                Tags: [],
                Status: 'Ingested',
                pendingClassified: false,
                pendingTags: [],
            };
            if (log.Application_Name) next.Application_Name = log.Application_Name;
            if (log.Log_Level) next.Log_Level = log.Log_Level.toUpperCase();
            if (log.Message) next.Message = log.Message;
            if (log.Timestamp) next.Timestamp = log.Timestamp;
            if (Array.isArray(log.Tags) && log.Tags.length > 0) next.Tags = log.Tags;
            if (log.Status) {
                const nextRank = STATUS_RANK[log.Status] || 0;
                const currentRank = STATUS_RANK[next.Status] || 0;
                if (nextRank >= currentRank) next.Status = log.Status;
            }
            logsByTraceId.set(next.Trace_ID, next);
            ensureApplicationOption(next.Application_Name);
            return next;
        }
        function applyStatusTransition(traceId, incomingStatus, tags = []) {
            const record = logsByTraceId.get(traceId);
            if (!record) return;
            if (incomingStatus === 'Normalized') {
                if ((STATUS_RANK[record.Status] || 0) < STATUS_RANK.Normalized) {
                    record.Status = 'Normalized';
                }
            } else if (incomingStatus === 'Persisted') {
                if ((STATUS_RANK[record.Status] || 0) < STATUS_RANK.Persisted) {
                    record.Status = 'Persisted';
                }
                if (record.pendingClassified) {
                    record.Tags = record.pendingTags.length ? record.pendingTags : record.Tags;
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        const refreshed = logsByTraceId.get(traceId);
                        if (!refreshed) return;
                        refreshed.Status = 'Classified';
                        scheduleRender();
                    }, 140);
                }
            } else if (incomingStatus === 'Classified') {
                if (tags.length) record.Tags = tags;
                if ((STATUS_RANK[record.Status] || 0) >= STATUS_RANK.Persisted) {
                    record.Status = 'Classified';
                } else {
                    record.pendingClassified = true;
                    record.pendingTags = tags;
                }
            }
        }
        function getVisibleLogs() {
            const query = document.getElementById('search-query').value.trim().toLowerCase();
            const searchCol = document.getElementById('search-col').value;
            const app = applicationFilter.value;
            const level = document.getElementById('level-filter').value;
            const status = document.getElementById('status-filter').value;
            return [...logsByTraceId.values()]
                .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.Timestamp) - new Date(a.Timestamp))
                .filter((log) => {
                    if (app && log.Application_Name !== app) return false;
                    if (level && log.Log_Level !== level) return false;
                    if (status && log.Status !== status) return false;
                    if (!query) return true;
                    if (searchCol === 'application') return log.Application_Name.toLowerCase().includes(query);
                    if (searchCol === 'trace_id') return log.Trace_ID.toLowerCase().includes(query);
                    if (searchCol === 'tags') return (log.Tags || []).some((tag) => String(tag).toLowerCase().includes(query));
                    return log.Message.toLowerCase().includes(query);
                });
        }
        function updateSummaryCards() {
            const logs = [...logsByTraceId.values()];
            const countByStatus = logs.reduce((acc, log) => {
                acc[log.Status] = (acc[log.Status] || 0) + 1;
                return acc;
            }, {});
            const ids = [
                ['summary-total', logs.length],
                ['summary-normalized', countByStatus.Normalized || 0],
                ['summary-persisted', countByStatus.Persisted || 0],
                ['summary-classified', countByStatus.Classified || 0],
            ];
            ids.forEach(([id, value]) => {
                const el = document.getElementById(id);
                if (!el) return;
                if (el.textContent !== String(value)) {
                    el.textContent = value;
                    el.classList.remove('animate-pulseCard');
                    void el.offsetWidth;
                    el.classList.add('animate-pulseCard');
                }
            });
        }
        function renderLogs() {
            const visibleLogs = getVisibleLogs();
            updateSummaryCards();
            if (visibleLogs.length === 0) {
                logsBody.innerHTML = `
                    <tr>
                        <td colspan="7" class="px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">
                            No logs found.
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                `;
                return;
            }
            logsBody.innerHTML = visibleLogs.map((log) => `
                <tr class="animate-slideDown align-top transition-colors hover:bg-blue-50/60 dark:hover:bg-white/5">
                    <td class="px-5 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">${formatTimestamp(log.Timestamp)}</td>
                    <td class="px-5 py-3">
                        <span class="inline-flex rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold ${levelClass(log.Log_Level)}">${escapeHtml(log.Log_Level)}</span>
                    </td>
                    <td class="px-5 py-3 text-sm">${escapeHtml(log.Application_Name)}</td>
                    <td class="px-5 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">${escapeHtml(log.Trace_ID)}</td>
                    <td class="px-5 py-3 text-sm whitespace-normal break-words">${escapeHtml(log.Message)}</td>
                    <td class="px-5 py-3">
                        <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                            ${(log.Tags || []).map((tag) => `<span class="rounded-full border border-gray-300 bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium dark:border-gray-600 dark:bg-white/10">${escapeHtml(tag)}</span>`).join('') || '<span class="text-xs text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">-</span>'}
                        </div>
                    </td>
                    <td class="px-5 py-3 text-sm font-bold ${statusClass(log.Status)}">${escapeHtml(log.Status)}</td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }
        function showGlobalAlert(log, count) {
            if (localStorage.getItem('alerts_enabled') === 'false') return;
            const container = document.getElementById('global-alert-container');
            const toast = document.createElement('div');
            toast.className = 'cloudscape-flash animate-fadeIn px-4 py-3 text-sm';
            toast.innerHTML = `
                <p class="font-bold text-red-500">${escapeHtml(log.Application_Name || 'Unknown')} · ${escapeHtml(log.Log_Level || 'ALERT')}</p>
                <p class="mt-1 text-aws-text dark:text-aws-textDark">${escapeHtml(log.Message || 'Alert')}</p>
                <p class="mt-1 text-xs text-aws-textMuted dark:text-aws-textMutedDark">Count: ${count || 1}</p>
            `;
            container.prepend(toast);
            setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 4000);
        }
        async function fetchHistoricalLogs() {
            const res = await fetch('/api/logs/recent', {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('logrider_token')}` }
            });
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch logs');
            const { logs } = await res.json();
            logsByTraceId.clear();
            applicationFilter.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Applications</option>';
            (logs || []).forEach((log) => upsertLog(normalizeHistoricalLog(log)));
            scheduleRender();
        }
        function connectWs() {
            if (ws) ws.close();
            const protocol = window.location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:';
            ws = new WebSocket(`${protocol}//${window.location.host}/api/ws`);
            ws.onopen = () => {
                setWsIndicator(true);
                fetchHistoricalLogs().catch((error) => {
                    console.error('Failed to backfill logs after WebSocket open:', error);
                });
            };
            ws.onclose = () => {
                setWsIndicator(false);
                setTimeout(connectWs, 3000);
            };
            ws.onerror = () => setWsIndicator(false);
            ws.onmessage = (event) => {
                let data;
                try {
                    data = JSON.parse(event.data);
                } catch {
                    return;
                }
                if (data.type === 'ALERT') {
                    showGlobalAlert(data.log || data, data.count || 1);
                    return;
                }
                if (data.type === 'TAGS') {
                    const record = upsertLog({
                        Trace_ID: data.Trace_ID,
                        Application_Name: data.Application_Name,
                        Tags: data.Tags || []
                    });
                    if (!record) return;
                    applyStatusTransition(record.Trace_ID, 'Classified', data.Tags || []);
                    scheduleRender();
                    return;
                }
                if (data.Trace_ID && data.Status === 'Normalized') {
                    const record = upsertLog({
                        Trace_ID: data.Trace_ID,
                        Application_Name: data.Application_Name
                    });
                    if (!record) return;
                    applyStatusTransition(record.Trace_ID, 'Normalized');
                    scheduleRender();
                    return;
                }
                if (data.Trace_ID && data.Status === 'Persisted') {
                    const record = upsertLog({
                        Trace_ID: data.Trace_ID,
                        Application_Name: data.Application_Name,
                        Log_Level: data.Log_Level,
                        Message: data.Message,
                        Timestamp: data.Timestamp
                    });
                    if (!record) return;
                    applyStatusTransition(record.Trace_ID, 'Persisted');
                    scheduleRender();
                    return;
                }
                if (data.Application_Name && data.Log_Level) {
                    const record = upsertLog({
                        Trace_ID: data.Trace_ID,
                        Application_Name: data.Application_Name,
                        Log_Level: data.Log_Level,
                        Message: data.Message,
                        Timestamp: data.Timestamp,
                        Status: 'Ingested'
                    });
                    if (!record) return;
                    scheduleRender();
                }
            };
        }
        function applyFilters() {
            scheduleRender();
        }
        async function handleRefresh() {
            const icon = document.getElementById('refresh-icon');
            const tableContainer = document.getElementById('logs-body');
            if (icon) {
                icon.style.animation = 'spin 1s linear infinite';
            }
            if (tableContainer) {
                tableContainer.classList.add('opacity-50', 'pointer-events-none', 'transition-opacity', 'duration-300');
            }
            try {
                const startTime = Date.now();
                await fetchHistoricalLogs();
                const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                if (elapsed < 1000) {
                    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000 - elapsed));
                }
            } finally {
                if (icon) {
                    icon.style.animation = '';
                }
                if (tableContainer) {
                    tableContainer.classList.remove('opacity-50', 'pointer-events-none');
                }
            }
        }
        async function showDashboard() {
            loginScreen.classList.add('hidden');
            dashboardScreen.classList.remove('hidden');
            dashboardScreen.classList.add('flex');
            if (typeof syncTopbarUser === 'function') syncTopbarUser();
            connectWs();
            try {
                await fetchHistoricalLogs();
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Failed to fetch historical logs:', error);
            }
        }
        document.getElementById('login-form').addEventListener('submit', async (event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            const username = document.getElementById('username').value;
            const password = document.getElementById('password').value;
            const errorEl = document.getElementById('login-error');
            errorEl.classList.add('hidden');
            const res = await fetch('/login', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ username, password })
            });
            const data = await res.json();
            if (!res.ok) {
                errorEl.textContent = data.error || 'Login failed';
                errorEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                return;
            }
            localStorage.setItem('logrider_token', data.token);
            localStorage.setItem('logrider_role', data.role);
            localStorage.setItem('logrider_username', username);
            await showDashboard();
        });
        window.logout = function() {
            localStorage.removeItem('logrider_token');
            localStorage.removeItem('logrider_role');
            localStorage.removeItem('logrider_username');
            if (ws) ws.close();
            window.location.reload();
        };
        initTheme();
        if (localStorage.getItem('logrider_token')) {
            showDashboard().catch(console.error);
        } else {
            setWsIndicator(false);
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: logrider/server/Dockerfile
````
FROM oven/bun:alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json bun.lockb* ./
RUN bun install
COPY . .
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["bun", "run", "index.js"]
````

## File: logrider/server/index.js
````javascript
const wsClients = new Set();
import { createClient } from "redis";
import path from "path";
import crypto from "crypto";
import pg from "pg";
import { Kafka } from "kafkajs";
const { Pool } = pg;
const kafka = new Kafka({
  clientId: "logrider-web-server",
  brokers: ["redpanda:29092"],
});
const PORT = process.env.SERVER_PORT || 3000;
const REDIS_URL = process.env.REDIS_URL || "redis://localhost:6379";
const POSTGRES_URI =
  process.env.POSTGRES_URI ||
  "postgres://logrider:password@postgres:5432/logrider";
const CLICKHOUSE_HOST = process.env.CLICKHOUSE_HOST || "clickhouse";
const CLICKHOUSE_USER = process.env.CLICKHOUSE_USER || "default";
const CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD = process.env.CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD || "password";
const chBaseUrl = `http://${CLICKHOUSE_HOST}:8123/?user=${CLICKHOUSE_USER}&password=${CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD}`;
const pgClient = new Pool({ connectionString: POSTGRES_URI });
pgClient.on("error", (err) =>
  console.error("Postgres Pool Error", err.message),
);
const CONFIG_REGISTRY = {
  "alert.dedup_ttl_seconds": {
    label: "Alert deduplication TTL",
    description: "Time window during which identical alert signatures are deduplicated.",
    type: "integer",
    defaultValue: 60,
    min: 1,
    max: 86400,
    presets: [1, 10, 30, 60, 600, 1800, 3600, 10800, 21600, 32400, 43200, 86400],
    public: false,
  },
  "alert.notification_ttl_seconds": {
    label: "Notification TTL",
    description: "How long alert notification state remains visible before expiring.",
    type: "integer",
    defaultValue: 86400,
    min: 10,
    max: 86400,
    presets: [10, 30, 60, 300, 600, 1800, 3600, 10800, 21600, 43200, 86400],
    public: false,
  },
  "alert.realert_threshold": {
    label: "Re-alert threshold",
    description: "Repeated occurrences required before an alert is re-notified.",
    type: "integer",
    defaultValue: 100,
    min: 1,
    max: 10000,
    presets: [1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000],
    public: false,
  },
  "alert.enabled_severities": {
    label: "Enabled alert severities",
    description: "Severities already routed to the alert worker that should produce notifications.",
    type: "array",
    itemType: "enum",
    defaultValue: ["ERROR", "CRITICAL"],
    options: ["ERROR", "CRITICAL"],
    public: true,
  },
  "alert.grouping_strategy": {
    label: "Alert grouping strategy",
    description: "Fields used to group repeated alerts into one signature.",
    type: "enum",
    defaultValue: "app_level_template",
    options: ["app_message_exact", "app_level_message_exact", "app_level_template", "message_template_only"],
    public: false,
  },
  "alert.popup_default_enabled": {
    label: "Browser popups default",
    description: "Default browser alert popup behavior when a user has no local preference.",
    type: "boolean",
    defaultValue: true,
    public: true,
  },
  "alert.popup_duration_ms": {
    label: "Browser popup duration",
    description: "How long dashboard alert popups remain visible.",
    type: "integer",
    defaultValue: 5000,
    min: 1000,
    max: 30000,
    presets: [3000, 5000, 8000, 10000],
    public: true,
  },
  "alert.websocket_reconnect_interval_ms": {
    label: "WebSocket reconnect interval",
    description: "Delay before the browser reconnects a dropped live stream.",
    type: "integer",
    defaultValue: 3000,
    min: 1000,
    max: 30000,
    presets: [1000, 3000, 5000, 10000],
    public: true,
  },
  "telegram.enabled": {
    label: "Telegram notifications enabled",
    description: "Global switch for outbound Telegram alert delivery.",
    type: "boolean",
    defaultValue: true,
    public: false,
  },
  "telegram.link_token_ttl_seconds": {
    label: "Telegram link-token expiry",
    description: "How long a generated Telegram account-link command remains valid.",
    type: "integer",
    defaultValue: 600,
    min: 60,
    max: 3600,
    presets: [300, 600, 900, 1800],
    public: false,
  },
  "retention.clickhouse_ttl_hours": {
    label: "ClickHouse log retention TTL",
    description: "Retention window applied to ClickHouse log tables.",
    type: "integer",
    defaultValue: 168,
    min: 1,
    max: 672,
    presets: [1, 3, 6, 9, 12, 24, 168, 336, 672],
    public: false,
  },
  "query.historical_logs_lookback_hours": {
    label: "Historical logs lookback",
    description: "Default window for recent-log API queries.",
    type: "integer",
    defaultValue: 168,
    min: 1,
    max: 672,
    presets: [24, 72, 168, 336, 672],
    public: false,
  },
  "dashboard.max_live_rows": {
    label: "Dashboard max live rows",
    description: "Maximum number of live rows kept in the browser log stream.",
    type: "integer",
    defaultValue: 500,
    min: 50,
    max: 5000,
    presets: [100, 250, 500, 1000, 2000],
    public: true,
  },
  "metrics.default_period": {
    label: "Default metrics period",
    description: "Default analytics period selected on the metrics page.",
    type: "enum",
    defaultValue: "7d",
    options: ["1h", "24h", "7d", "14d", "28d"],
    public: true,
  },
  "metrics.enabled_periods": {
    label: "Enabled metrics periods",
    description: "Allowed period options shown by the metrics UI.",
    type: "array",
    itemType: "enum",
    defaultValue: ["1h", "24h", "7d", "14d", "28d"],
    options: ["1h", "24h", "7d", "14d", "28d"],
    public: true,
  },
  "metrics.high_error_rate_threshold_percent": {
    label: "High error-rate threshold",
    description: "Threshold used by the UI to mark high error-rate applications.",
    type: "number",
    defaultValue: 10,
    min: 0,
    max: 100,
    presets: [1, 5, 10, 20, 50],
    public: true,
  },
  "display.default_theme": {
    label: "Default theme",
    description: "Theme used when a browser has no saved preference.",
    type: "enum",
    defaultValue: "system",
    options: ["system", "light", "dark"],
    public: true,
  },
  "display.timestamp_timezone_policy": {
    label: "Timestamp timezone policy",
    description: "How browser pages should localize timestamps.",
    type: "enum",
    defaultValue: "browser",
    options: ["browser", "utc"],
    public: true,
  },
  "display.timestamp_format": {
    label: "Timestamp format",
    description: "Preferred timestamp rendering format for browser pages.",
    type: "enum",
    defaultValue: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS",
    options: ["YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS", "YYYY-MM-DD\\nHH:mm:ss.SSS", "locale"],
    public: true,
  },
};
const LEGACY_CONFIG_KEYS = {
  "alert.dedup_ttl_seconds": "config:alert_ttl",
  "alert.notification_ttl_seconds": "config:noti_ttl",
};
function validateConfigValue(key, value) {
  const entry = CONFIG_REGISTRY[key];
  if (!entry) return { ok: false, message: "Unknown config key" };
  if (entry.type === "integer") {
    const parsed = Number(value);
    if (!Number.isInteger(parsed)) return { ok: false, message: "Value must be an integer" };
    if (parsed < entry.min || parsed > entry.max) {
      return { ok: false, message: `Value must be between ${entry.min} and ${entry.max}` };
    }
    return { ok: true, value: parsed };
  }
  if (entry.type === "number") {
    const parsed = Number(value);
    if (!Number.isFinite(parsed)) return { ok: false, message: "Value must be a number" };
    if (parsed < entry.min || parsed > entry.max) {
      return { ok: false, message: `Value must be between ${entry.min} and ${entry.max}` };
    }
    return { ok: true, value: parsed };
  }
  if (entry.type === "boolean") {
    if (typeof value !== "boolean") return { ok: false, message: "Value must be true or false" };
    return { ok: true, value };
  }
  if (entry.type === "enum") {
    if (!entry.options.includes(value)) return { ok: false, message: "Value is not an allowed option" };
    return { ok: true, value };
  }
  if (entry.type === "array") {
    if (!Array.isArray(value)) return { ok: false, message: "Value must be an array" };
    if (value.length === 0) return { ok: false, message: "At least one option must be selected" };
    const unique = [...new Set(value)];
    if (unique.length !== value.length) return { ok: false, message: "Duplicate options are not allowed" };
    const invalid = value.find((item) => !entry.options.includes(item));
    if (invalid) return { ok: false, message: `Unsupported option: ${invalid}` };
    return { ok: true, value };
  }
  return { ok: false, message: "Unsupported config type" };
}
async function getConfigValue(key) {
  const entry = CONFIG_REGISTRY[key];
  if (!entry) throw new Error(`Unknown config key: ${key}`);
  const raw = await redisClient.get(`config:${key}`);
  if (raw) return JSON.parse(raw);
  const legacyKey = LEGACY_CONFIG_KEYS[key];
  if (legacyKey) {
    const legacyRaw = await redisClient.get(legacyKey);
    if (legacyRaw) return parseInt(legacyRaw, 10);
  }
  return entry.defaultValue;
}
async function setConfigValue(key, value) {
  await redisClient.set(`config:${key}`, JSON.stringify(value));
  const legacyKey = LEGACY_CONFIG_KEYS[key];
  if (legacyKey) await redisClient.set(legacyKey, String(value));
}
async function getConfigSnapshot({ publicOnly = false } = {}) {
  const entries = await Promise.all(
    Object.entries(CONFIG_REGISTRY)
      .filter(([, entry]) => !publicOnly || entry.public)
      .map(async ([key, entry]) => [
        key,
        {
          ...entry,
          value: await getConfigValue(key),
        },
      ]),
  );
  return Object.fromEntries(entries);
}
async function requireSession(req, { adminOnly = false } = {}) {
  const token = req.headers.get("authorization")?.replace("Bearer ", "");
  if (!token) return { response: Response.json({ error: "No token" }, { status: 401 }) };
  const sessionStr = await redisClient.get(`session:${token}`);
  if (!sessionStr) return { response: Response.json({ error: "Invalid token" }, { status: 401 }) };
  const session = JSON.parse(sessionStr);
  if (adminOnly && !session.is_admin) {
    return { response: Response.json({ error: "Forbidden. Admins only." }, { status: 403 }) };
  }
  return { session };
}
function quoteClickHouseString(value) {
  return `'${String(value).replace(/\\/g, "\\\\").replace(/'/g, "''")}'`;
}
function getIntervalStr(period) {
  if (period === "1h") return "1 HOUR";
  if (period === "7d") return "7 DAY";
  if (period === "14d") return "14 DAY";
  if (period === "28d") return "28 DAY";
  return "24 HOUR";
}
async function getConfiguredAnalyticsPeriod(requestedPeriod) {
  const enabledPeriods = await getConfigValue("metrics.enabled_periods");
  const defaultPeriod = await getConfigValue("metrics.default_period");
  if (requestedPeriod && enabledPeriods.includes(requestedPeriod)) return requestedPeriod;
  if (enabledPeriods.includes(defaultPeriod)) return defaultPeriod;
  return enabledPeriods[0] || "24h";
}
(async () => {
  let retries = 5;
  while (retries > 0) {
    try {
      await pgClient.connect();
      console.log("Connected to Postgres");
      break;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Postgres connection failed, retrying in 2s...", e.message);
      retries -= 1;
      await new Promise((res) => setTimeout(res, 2000));
    }
  }
  try {
    await pgClient.query(`
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
                id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
                username VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
                role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
                allowed_apps TEXT
            );
        `);
    const { rows } = await pgClient.query("SELECT count(*) FROM users");
    if (parseInt(rows[0].count) === 0) {
      const adminHash = await Bun.password.hash("admin123");
      const eng1Hash = await Bun.password.hash("eng123");
      const eng2Hash = await Bun.password.hash("eng123");
      await pgClient.query(
        `INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, role, allowed_apps) VALUES
                ('Ayin', $1, 'admin', '*'),
                ('Benjamin', $2, 'engineer', 'su(pam_unix),logrotate,syslogd 1.4.1'),
                ('Carmen', $3, 'engineer', 'ftpd,snmpd,cups,sshd(pam_unix)')
            `,
        [adminHash, eng1Hash, eng2Hash],
      );
      console.log("Inserted default users");
    }
  } catch (e) {
    console.error("Postgres Initialization error:", e);
  }
})();
const redisClient = createClient({ url: REDIS_URL });
redisClient.on("error", (err) => console.error("Redis Client Error", err));
const redisSubscriber = redisClient.duplicate();
redisSubscriber.on("error", (err) =>
  console.error("Redis Subscriber Error", err),
);
let bunServer;
(async () => {
  try {
    await redisClient.connect();
    console.log("Connected to Redis");
    await redisSubscriber.connect();
    await redisSubscriber.subscribe("alerts-stream", (message) => {
      if (bunServer) {
        try {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(message);
          const appName =
            parsed.log?.Application_Name || parsed.Application_Name;
          const appDelivered = appName ? bunServer.publish(`alerts-stream:${appName}`, message) : 0;
          const globalDelivered = bunServer.publish(`alerts-stream:global`, message);
          console.log('[WS alerts]', {
              appName,
              appDelivered,
              globalDelivered,
          });
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("Error handling alerts-stream message:", e);
        }
      }
    });
    await redisSubscriber.subscribe("ws-events", (message) => {
      if (bunServer) {
        try {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(message);
          const appName =
            parsed.Application_Name || parsed.log?.Application_Name;
````
